name: ceil_lt_add_one_of_gt_neg_one
statement: theorem ceil_lt_add_one_of_gt_neg_one (ha : -1 < a) : ⌈a⌉₊ < a + 1
proof:
by_cases! h : 0 ≤ a
  · exact ceil_lt_add_one h
  · rw [ceil_eq_zero.mpr h.le, cast_zero]
    exact neg_lt_iff_pos_add.mp ha

end Nat

section FloorRingToSemiring

variable [Ring R] [LinearOrder R] [IsOrderedRing R] [FloorRing R]

/-! #### A floor ring as a floor semiring -/

variable {a : R}

name: natCast_floor_eq_intCast_floor
statement: theorem natCast_floor_eq_intCast_floor (ha : 0 ≤ a) : (⌊a⌋₊ : R) = ⌊a⌋
proof: rw [← Int.natCast_floor_eq_floor ha, Int.cast_natCast]

name: natCast_ceil_eq_intCast_ceil
statement: theorem natCast_ceil_eq_intCast_ceil (ha : 0 ≤ a) : (⌈a⌉₊ : R) = ⌈a⌉
proof: rw [← Int.natCast_ceil_eq_ceil ha, Int.cast_natCast]

name: natCast_ceil_eq_intCast_ceil_of_neg_one_lt
statement: theorem natCast_ceil_eq_intCast_ceil_of_neg_one_lt (ha : -1 < a) : (⌈a⌉₊ : R) = ⌈a⌉
proof:
rw [← Int.natCast_ceil_eq_ceil_of_neg_one_lt ha, Int.cast_natCast]

end FloorRingToSemiring

/-- There exists at most one `FloorRing` structure on a given linear ordered ring. -/

name: floorDiv_le_ceilDiv
statement: theorem floorDiv_le_ceilDiv  : b ⌊/⌋ a ≤ b ⌈/⌉ a
proof:
obtain ha | ha := le_or_gt a 0
  · simp [ha]
  · exact le_of_smul_le_smul_left ((smul_floorDiv_le ha).trans <| le_smul_ceilDiv ha) ha

end LinearOrderedAddCommMonoid

section OrderedSemiring
variable [Semiring α] [PartialOrder α] [AddCommMonoid β] [PartialOrder β] [MulActionWithZero α β]

section FloorDiv
variable [FloorDiv α β] {a : α}

@[simp] lemma floorDiv_one [IsOrderedRing α] [Nontrivial α] (b : β) : b ⌊/⌋ (1 : α) = b :=
  eq_of_forall_le_iff <| fun c ↦ by simp [zero_lt_one' α]

@[simp] lemma smul_floorDiv [PosSMulMono α β] [PosSMulReflectLE α β] (ha : 0 < a) (b : β) :
    a • b ⌊/⌋ a = b :=
  eq_of_forall_le_iff <| by simp [smul_le_smul_iff_of_pos_left, ha]

end FloorDiv

section CeilDiv
variable [CeilDiv α β] {a : α}

@[simp] lemma ceilDiv_one [IsOrderedRing α] [Nontrivial α] (b : β) : b ⌈/⌉ (1 : α) = b :=
  eq_of_forall_ge_iff <| fun c ↦ by simp [zero_lt_one' α]

@[simp] lemma smul_ceilDiv [PosSMulMono α β] [PosSMulReflectLE α β] (ha : 0 < a) (b : β) :
    a • b ⌈/⌉ a = b :=
  eq_of_forall_ge_iff <| by simp [smul_le_smul_iff_of_pos_left, ha]

end CeilDiv

section FloorDiv
variable [FloorDiv α α] {a b c : α}

name: support_floorDiv_subset
statement: theorem support_floorDiv_subset  : (f ⌊/⌋ a).support ⊆ f.support
proof:
simp +contextual [Finset.subset_iff, not_imp_not]

end FloorDiv

section CeilDiv
variable [CeilDiv α β] {f : ι →₀ β} {a : α}

noncomputable instance instCeilDiv : CeilDiv α (ι →₀ β) where
  ceilDiv f a := f.mapRange (· ⌈/⌉ a) <| zero_ceilDiv _
  ceilDiv_gc _a ha f _g := forall_congr' fun i ↦ by
    simpa only [coe_smul, Pi.smul_apply, mapRange_apply] using gc_smul_ceilDiv ha (f i) _
  ceilDiv_nonpos a ha f := by ext i; exact ceilDiv_of_nonpos ha _
  zero_ceilDiv a := by ext; exact zero_ceilDiv _

name: support_ceilDiv_subset
statement: theorem support_ceilDiv_subset  : (f ⌈/⌉ a).support ⊆ f.support
proof:
simp +contextual [Finset.subset_iff, not_imp_not]

end CeilDiv
end Finsupp

/-- This is the motivating example. -/
noncomputable example : FloorDiv ℕ (ℕ →₀ ℕ) := inferInstance

name: ceil_lt_add_one
statement: theorem ceil_lt_add_one (hr : r ≠ ∞) : (⌈r⌉ₑ : ℝ≥0∞) < r + 1
proof:
lift r to ℝ≥0 using hr; simpa using mod_cast Nat.ceil_lt_add_one zero_le

@[bound]

name: floor_eq_iff
statement: theorem floor_eq_iff (ha : 0 ≤ a) : ⌊a⌋₊ = n ↔ ↑n ≤ a ∧ a < ↑n + 1
proof:
rw [← le_floor_iff ha, ← Nat.cast_one, ← Nat.cast_add, ← floor_lt ha, Nat.lt_add_one_iff,
    le_antisymm_iff, and_comm]

variable [IsStrictOrderedRing R]

name: floor_pos
statement: theorem floor_pos  : 0 < ⌊a⌋₊ ↔ 1 ≤ a
proof: rw [Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, zero_add, le_floor_iff' Nat.one_ne_zero, cast_one]

name: floor_eq_zero
statement: theorem floor_eq_zero  : ⌊a⌋₊ = 0 ↔ a < 1
proof:
rw [← lt_one_iff, ← @cast_one R]
  exact floor_lt' Nat.one_ne_zero

name: add_one_le_ceil_iff
statement: theorem add_one_le_ceil_iff  : n + 1 ≤ ⌈a⌉₊ ↔ (n : R) < a
proof:
rw [← Nat.lt_ceil, Nat.add_one_le_iff]

@[simp]

name: one_le_ceil_iff
statement: theorem one_le_ceil_iff  : 1 ≤ ⌈a⌉₊ ↔ 0 < a
proof:
rw [← zero_add 1, Nat.add_one_le_ceil_iff, Nat.cast_zero]

@[bound]

name: ceil_eq_iff
statement: theorem ceil_eq_iff (hn : n ≠ 0) : ⌈a⌉₊ = n ↔ ↑(n - 1) < a ∧ a ≤ n
proof:
rw [← ceil_le, ← not_le, ← ceil_le, not_le,
    tsub_lt_iff_right (Nat.add_one_le_iff.2 (pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hn)), Nat.lt_add_one_iff,
    le_antisymm_iff, and_comm]

@[simp]

name: ceil_le_floor_add_one
statement: theorem ceil_le_floor_add_one (a : R) : ⌈a⌉₊ ≤ ⌊a⌋₊ + 1
proof:
rw [ceil_le, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
  exact (lt_floor_add_one a).le

@[simp]

name: floor_le_ceil
statement: theorem floor_le_ceil (a : R) : ⌊a⌋₊ ≤ ⌈a⌉₊
proof:
obtain ha | ha := le_total a 0
  · rw [floor_of_nonpos ha]
    exact Nat.zero_le _
  · exact cast_le.1 ((floor_le ha).trans <| le_ceil _)

name: floor_add_one
statement: theorem floor_add_one (ha : 0 ≤ a) : ⌊a + 1⌋₊ = ⌊a⌋₊ + 1
proof:
rw [← cast_one, floor_add_natCast ha 1]

@[push]

name: ceil_add_one
statement: theorem ceil_add_one (ha : 0 ≤ a) : ⌈a + 1⌉₊ = ⌈a⌉₊ + 1
proof: rw [cast_one.symm, ceil_add_natCast ha 1]

name: ceil_add_le
statement: theorem ceil_add_le (a b : R) : ⌈a + b⌉₊ ≤ ⌈a⌉₊ + ⌈b⌉₊
proof:
rw [ceil_le, Nat.cast_add]
  gcongr <;> apply le_ceil

variable [Sub R] [OrderedSub R] [ExistsAddOfLE R]

@[simp] lemma ceil_sub_natCast (a : R) (n : ℕ) : ⌈a - n⌉₊ = ⌈a⌉₊ - n := by
  obtain han | hna := le_total a n
  · rwa [ceil_eq_zero.2 (tsub_nonpos_of_le han), eq_comm, tsub_eq_zero_iff_le, Nat.ceil_le]
  · refine eq_tsub_of_add_eq ?_
    rw [← ceil_add_natCast, tsub_add_cancel_of_le hna]
    exact le_tsub_of_add_le_left ((add_zero _).trans_le hna)

@[simp] lemma ceil_sub_one (a : R) : ⌈a - 1⌉₊ = ⌈a⌉₊ - 1 := by simpa using ceil_sub_natCast a 1

@[simp] lemma ceil_sub_ofNat (a : R) (n : ℕ) [n.AtLeastTwo] : ⌈a - ofNat(n)⌉₊ = ⌈a⌉₊ - ofNat(n) :=
  ceil_sub_natCast a n

end LinearOrderedSemiring

section LinearOrderedRing

variable [Ring R] [LinearOrder R] [IsStrictOrderedRing R] [FloorSemiring R]

@[bound]

name: map_add_left_Icc
statement: theorem map_add_left_Icc (a b c : α) : (Icc a b).map (c + ·) = Icc (c + a) (c + b)
proof:
classical rw [Icc, Icc, ← Finset.image_add_left_Icc, Finset.image_val,
      ((Finset.nodup _).map <| add_right_injective c).dedup]

name: map_add_left_Ico
statement: theorem map_add_left_Ico (a b c : α) : (Ico a b).map (c + ·) = Ico (c + a) (c + b)
proof:
classical rw [Ico, Ico, ← Finset.image_add_left_Ico, Finset.image_val,
      ((Finset.nodup _).map <| add_right_injective c).dedup]

name: map_add_left_Ioc
statement: theorem map_add_left_Ioc (a b c : α) : (Ioc a b).map (c + ·) = Ioc (c + a) (c + b)
proof:
classical rw [Ioc, Ioc, ← Finset.image_add_left_Ioc, Finset.image_val,
      ((Finset.nodup _).map <| add_right_injective c).dedup]

name: map_add_left_Ioo
statement: theorem map_add_left_Ioo (a b c : α) : (Ioo a b).map (c + ·) = Ioo (c + a) (c + b)
proof:
classical rw [Ioo, Ioo, ← Finset.image_add_left_Ioo, Finset.image_val,
      ((Finset.nodup _).map <| add_right_injective c).dedup]

name: map_add_right_Icc
statement: theorem map_add_right_Icc (a b c : α) : ((Icc a b).map fun x => x + c) = Icc (a + c) (b + c)
proof:
simp_rw [add_comm _ c]
  exact map_add_left_Icc _ _ _

name: map_add_right_Ico
statement: theorem map_add_right_Ico (a b c : α) : ((Ico a b).map fun x => x + c) = Ico (a + c) (b + c)
proof:
simp_rw [add_comm _ c]
  exact map_add_left_Ico _ _ _

name: map_add_right_Ioc
statement: theorem map_add_right_Ioc (a b c : α) : ((Ioc a b).map fun x => x + c) = Ioc (a + c) (b + c)
proof:
simp_rw [add_comm _ c]
  exact map_add_left_Ioc _ _ _

name: map_add_right_Ioo
statement: theorem map_add_right_Ioo (a b c : α) : ((Ioo a b).map fun x => x + c) = Ioo (a + c) (b + c)
proof:
simp_rw [add_comm _ c]
  exact map_add_left_Ioo _ _ _

end Multiset

name: mul_eq_one_iff
statement: theorem mul_eq_one_iff  : s * t = 1 ↔ ∃ a b, s = pure a ∧ t = pure b ∧ a * b = 1
proof:
refine ⟨fun h => ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [NonemptyInterval.ext_iff, Prod.ext_iff] at h
    have := (mul_le_mul_iff_of_ge s.fst_le_snd t.fst_le_snd).1 (h.2.trans h.1.symm).le
    refine ⟨s.fst, t.fst, ?_, ?_, h.1⟩ <;> apply NonemptyInterval.ext <;> dsimp [pure]
    · nth_rw 2 [this.1]
    · nth_rw 2 [this.2]
  · rintro ⟨b, c, rfl, rfl, h⟩
    rw [pure_mul_pure, h, pure_one]

instance subtractionCommMonoid {α : Type u}
    [AddCommGroup α] [PartialOrder α] [IsOrderedAddMonoid α] :
    SubtractionCommMonoid (NonemptyInterval α) where
  sub_eq_add_neg := fun s t => by
    refine NonemptyInterval.ext (Prod.ext ?_ ?_) <;>
    exact sub_eq_add_neg _ _
  neg_neg := fun s => by apply NonemptyInterval.ext; exact neg_neg _
  neg_add_rev := fun s t => by
    refine NonemptyInterval.ext (Prod.ext ?_ ?_) <;>
    exact neg_add_rev _ _
  neg_eq_of_add := fun s t h => by
    obtain ⟨a, b, rfl, rfl, hab⟩ := NonemptyInterval.add_eq_zero_iff.1 h
    rw [neg_pure, neg_eq_of_add_eq_zero_right hab]
  -- TODO: use a better defeq
  zsmul := zsmulRec

@[to_additive existing NonemptyInterval.subtractionCommMonoid]
instance divisionCommMonoid : DivisionCommMonoid (NonemptyInterval α) where
  div_eq_mul_inv := fun s t => by
    refine NonemptyInterval.ext (Prod.ext ?_ ?_) <;>
    exact div_eq_mul_inv _ _
  inv_inv := fun s => by apply NonemptyInterval.ext; exact inv_inv _
  mul_inv_rev := fun s t => by
    refine NonemptyInterval.ext (Prod.ext ?_ ?_) <;>
    exact mul_inv_rev _ _
  inv_eq_of_mul := fun s t h => by
    obtain ⟨a, b, rfl, rfl, hab⟩ := NonemptyInterval.mul_eq_one_iff.1 h
    rw [inv_pure, inv_eq_of_mul_eq_one_right hab]

end NonemptyInterval

namespace Interval

variable [CommGroup α] [PartialOrder α] [IsOrderedMonoid α] {s t : Interval α}

@[to_additive]
protected theorem mul_eq_one_iff : s * t = 1 ↔ ∃ a b, s = pure a ∧ t = pure b ∧ a * b = 1 := by
  cases s
  · simp
  cases t
  · simp
  · simp_rw [← NonemptyInterval.coe_mul_interval, ← NonemptyInterval.coe_one_interval,
      Interval.coe_inj, NonemptyInterval.coe_eq_pure]
    exact NonemptyInterval.mul_eq_one_iff

instance subtractionCommMonoid {α : Type u}
    [AddCommGroup α] [PartialOrder α] [IsOrderedAddMonoid α] :
    SubtractionCommMonoid (Interval α) where
  sub_eq_add_neg := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (sub_eq_add_neg _ _)
  neg_neg := by rintro (_ | s) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (neg_neg _)
  neg_add_rev := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (neg_add_rev _ _)
  neg_eq_of_add := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) h <;>
      first
        | cases h
        | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (neg_eq_of_add_eq_zero_right <| WithBot.coe_injective h)
  -- TODO: use a better defeq
  zsmul := zsmulRec

@[to_additive existing Interval.subtractionCommMonoid]
instance divisionCommMonoid : DivisionCommMonoid (Interval α) where
  div_eq_mul_inv := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (div_eq_mul_inv _ _)
  inv_inv := by rintro (_ | s) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (inv_inv _)
  mul_inv_rev := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) <;> first | rfl | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (mul_inv_rev _ _)
  inv_eq_of_mul := by
    rintro (_ | s) (_ | t) h <;>
      first
        | cases h
        | exact congr_arg WithBot.some (inv_eq_of_mul_eq_one_right <| WithBot.coe_injective h)

end Interval

section Length

variable [AddCommGroup α] [PartialOrder α] [IsOrderedAddMonoid α]

namespace NonemptyInterval

variable (s t : NonemptyInterval α) (a : α)

/-- The length of an interval is its first component minus its second component. This measures the
accuracy of the approximation by an interval. -/

name: length_sub_le
statement: theorem length_sub_le  : (s - t).length ≤ s.length + t.length
proof: simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using length_add_le s (-t)

name: add_tsub_le_assoc
statement: theorem add_tsub_le_assoc  : a + b - c ≤ a + (b - c)
proof:
grw [tsub_le_iff_left, add_left_comm, ← le_add_tsub]

/-- See `tsub_add_eq_add_tsub` for the equality. -/

name: add_tsub_le_tsub_add
statement: theorem add_tsub_le_tsub_add  : a + b - c ≤ a - c + b
proof:
rw [add_comm, add_comm _ b]
  exact add_tsub_le_assoc

name: le_tsub_add_add
statement: theorem le_tsub_add_add  : a + b ≤ a - c + (b + c)
proof:
rw [add_comm a, add_comm (a - c)]
  exact add_le_add_add_tsub

name: tsub_le_tsub_add_tsub
statement: theorem tsub_le_tsub_add_tsub  : a - c ≤ a - b + (b - c)
proof: grw [tsub_le_iff_left, ← add_assoc, add_right_comm, ← le_add_tsub, ← le_add_tsub]

name: tsub_tsub_tsub_le_tsub
statement: theorem tsub_tsub_tsub_le_tsub  : c - a - (c - b) ≤ b - a
proof: grw [tsub_le_iff_left, tsub_le_iff_left, add_left_comm, ← le_add_tsub, ← le_tsub_add]

name: add_tsub_add_le_tsub_add_tsub
statement: theorem add_tsub_add_le_tsub_add_tsub  : a + b - (c + d) ≤ a - c + (b - d)
proof:
rw [add_comm c, tsub_le_iff_left, add_assoc, ← tsub_le_iff_left, ← tsub_le_iff_left]
  refine (tsub_le_tsub_right add_tsub_le_assoc c).trans ?_
  rw [add_comm a, add_comm (a - c)]
  exact add_tsub_le_assoc

/-- See `add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_left` for the equality. -/

name: add_tsub_add_le_tsub_left
statement: theorem add_tsub_add_le_tsub_left  : a + b - (a + c) ≤ b - c
proof:
grw [tsub_le_iff_left, add_assoc, ← le_add_tsub]

/-- See `add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_right` for the equality. -/

name: add_tsub_add_le_tsub_right
statement: theorem add_tsub_add_le_tsub_right  : a + c - (b + c) ≤ a - b
proof:
grw [tsub_le_iff_left, add_right_comm, ← le_add_tsub]

end Cov

/-! #### Lemmas that assume that an element is `AddLECancellable` -/


namespace AddLECancellable

protected theorem le_add_tsub_swap (hb : AddLECancellable b) : a ≤ b + a - b :=
  hb le_add_tsub

protected theorem le_add_tsub (hb : AddLECancellable b) : a ≤ a + b - b := by
  rw [add_comm]
  exact hb.le_add_tsub_swap

protected theorem le_tsub_of_add_le_left (ha : AddLECancellable a) (h : a + b ≤ c) : b ≤ c - a :=
  ha <| h.trans le_add_tsub

protected theorem le_tsub_of_add_le_right (hb : AddLECancellable b) (h : a + b ≤ c) : a ≤ c - b :=
  hb.le_tsub_of_add_le_left <| by rwa [add_comm]

end AddLECancellable

/-! ### Lemmas where addition is order-reflecting -/


section Contra

variable [AddLeftReflectLE α]

name: tsub_tsub
statement: theorem tsub_tsub (b a c : α) : b - a - c = b - (a + c)
proof:
apply le_antisymm
  · rw [tsub_le_iff_left, tsub_le_iff_left, ← add_assoc, ← tsub_le_iff_left]
  · rw [tsub_le_iff_left, add_assoc, ← tsub_le_iff_left, ← tsub_le_iff_left]

name: tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub_swap
statement: theorem tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub_swap (a b c : α) : a - (b + c) = a - c - b
proof:
rw [add_comm]
  apply tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub

name: tsub_right_comm
statement: theorem tsub_right_comm  : a - b - c = a - c - b
proof:
rw [← tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub, tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub_swap]

/-! ### Lemmas that assume that an element is `AddLECancellable`. -/


namespace AddLECancellable

/-- See `AddLECancellable.tsub_eq_of_eq_add'` for a version assuming that `a = c + b` itself is
cancellable rather than `b`. -/
protected theorem tsub_eq_of_eq_add (hb : AddLECancellable b) (h : a = c + b) : a - b = c :=
  le_antisymm (tsub_le_iff_right.mpr h.le) <| by
    rw [h]
    exact hb.le_add_tsub

/-- Weaker version of `AddLECancellable.tsub_eq_of_eq_add` assuming that `a = c + b` itself is
cancellable rather than `b`. -/
protected lemma tsub_eq_of_eq_add' [AddLeftMono α] (ha : AddLECancellable a)
    (h : a = c + b) : a - b = c := (h ▸ ha).of_add_right.tsub_eq_of_eq_add h

/-- See `AddLECancellable.eq_tsub_of_add_eq'` for a version assuming that `b = a + c` itself is
cancellable rather than `c`. -/
protected theorem eq_tsub_of_add_eq (hc : AddLECancellable c) (h : a + c = b) : a = b - c :=
  (hc.tsub_eq_of_eq_add h.symm).symm

/-- Weaker version of `AddLECancellable.eq_tsub_of_add_eq` assuming that `b = a + c` itself is
cancellable rather than `c`. -/
protected lemma eq_tsub_of_add_eq' [AddLeftMono α] (hb : AddLECancellable b)
    (h : a + c = b) : a = b - c := (hb.tsub_eq_of_eq_add' h.symm).symm

/-- See `AddLECancellable.tsub_eq_of_eq_add_rev'` for a version assuming that `a = b + c` itself is
cancellable rather than `b`. -/
protected theorem tsub_eq_of_eq_add_rev (hb : AddLECancellable b) (h : a = b + c) : a - b = c :=
  hb.tsub_eq_of_eq_add <| by rw [add_comm, h]

/-- Weaker version of `AddLECancellable.tsub_eq_of_eq_add_rev` assuming that `a = b + c` itself is
cancellable rather than `b`. -/
protected lemma tsub_eq_of_eq_add_rev' [AddLeftMono α]
    (ha : AddLECancellable a) (h : a = b + c) : a - b = c :=
  ha.tsub_eq_of_eq_add' <| by rw [add_comm, h]

@[simp]
protected theorem add_tsub_cancel_right (hb : AddLECancellable b) : a + b - b = a :=
  hb.tsub_eq_of_eq_add <| by rw [add_comm]

@[simp]
protected theorem add_tsub_cancel_left (ha : AddLECancellable a) : a + b - a = b :=
  ha.tsub_eq_of_eq_add <| add_comm a b

protected theorem lt_add_of_tsub_lt_left (hb : AddLECancellable b) (h : a - b < c) : a < b + c := by
  rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne, ← tsub_le_iff_left]
  refine ⟨h.le, ?_⟩
  rintro rfl
  simp [hb] at h

protected theorem lt_add_of_tsub_lt_right (hc : AddLECancellable c) (h : a - c < b) :
    a < b + c := by
  rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne, ← tsub_le_iff_right]
  refine ⟨h.le, ?_⟩
  rintro rfl
  simp [hc] at h

protected theorem lt_tsub_of_add_lt_right (hc : AddLECancellable c) (h : a + c < b) : a < b - c :=
  (hc.le_tsub_of_add_le_right h.le).lt_of_ne <| by
    rintro rfl
    exact h.not_ge le_tsub_add

protected theorem lt_tsub_of_add_lt_left (ha : AddLECancellable a) (h : a + c < b) : c < b - a :=
  ha.lt_tsub_of_add_lt_right <| by rwa [add_comm]

end AddLECancellable

/-! #### Lemmas where addition is order-reflecting. -/


section Contra

variable [AddLeftReflectLE α]

name: tsub_eq_tsub_of_add_eq_add
statement: theorem tsub_eq_tsub_of_add_eq_add (h : a + d = c + b) : a - b = c - d
proof:
calc a - b = a + d - d - b := by rw [add_tsub_cancel_right]
           _ = c + b - b - d := by rw [h, tsub_right_comm]
           _ = c - d := by rw [add_tsub_cancel_right]

name: add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_right
statement: theorem add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_right (a c b : α) : a + c - (b + c) = a - b
proof:
refine add_tsub_add_le_tsub_right.antisymm (tsub_le_iff_right.2 <| ?_)
  apply le_of_add_le_add_right
  rw [add_assoc]
  exact le_tsub_add

name: add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_left
statement: theorem add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_left (a b c : α) : a + b - (a + c) = b - c
proof:
rw [add_comm a b, add_comm a c, add_tsub_add_eq_tsub_right]

end Both

end OrderedAddCommSemigroup

/-! ### Lemmas in a linearly ordered monoid. -/


section LinearOrder

variable {a b c : α} [LinearOrder α] [AddCommSemigroup α] [Sub α] [OrderedSub α]

/-- See `lt_of_tsub_lt_tsub_right_of_le` for a weaker statement in a partial order. -/

name: tsub_add_cancel_iff_le
statement: theorem tsub_add_cancel_iff_le  : b - a + a = b ↔ a ≤ b
proof:
rw [add_comm]
  exact add_tsub_cancel_iff_le

-- This was previously a `@[simp]` lemma, but it is not necessarily a good idea, e.g. in
-- `example (h : n - m = 0) : a + (n - m) = a := by simp_all`

name: tsub_eq_zero_iff_le
statement: theorem tsub_eq_zero_iff_le  : a - b = 0 ↔ a ≤ b
proof:
rw [← nonpos_iff_eq_zero, tsub_le_iff_left, add_zero]

alias ⟨_, tsub_eq_zero_of_le⟩ := tsub_eq_zero_iff_le

@[simp]

name: tsub_pos_iff_not_le
statement: theorem tsub_pos_iff_not_le  : 0 < a - b ↔ ¬a ≤ b
proof: rw [pos_iff_ne_zero, Ne, tsub_eq_zero_iff_le]

name: tsub_eq_tsub_min
statement: theorem tsub_eq_tsub_min (a b : α) : a - b = a - min a b
proof:
rcases le_total a b with h | h
  · rw [min_eq_left h, tsub_self, tsub_eq_zero_of_le h]
  · rw [min_eq_right h]

namespace AddLECancellable

omit [CanonicallyOrderedAdd α] in
protected theorem lt_tsub_iff_right (hc : AddLECancellable c) : a < b - c ↔ a + c < b :=
  ⟨lt_imp_lt_of_le_imp_le tsub_le_iff_right.mpr, hc.lt_tsub_of_add_lt_right⟩

omit [CanonicallyOrderedAdd α] in
protected theorem lt_tsub_iff_left (hc : AddLECancellable c) : a < b - c ↔ c + a < b :=
  ⟨lt_imp_lt_of_le_imp_le tsub_le_iff_left.mpr, hc.lt_tsub_of_add_lt_left⟩

protected theorem tsub_lt_tsub_iff_right (hc : AddLECancellable c) (h : c ≤ a) :
    a - c < b - c ↔ a < b := by rw [hc.lt_tsub_iff_left, add_tsub_cancel_of_le h]

protected theorem tsub_lt_self (ha : AddLECancellable a) (h₁ : 0 < a) (h₂ : 0 < b) : a - b < a := by
  refine tsub_le_self.lt_of_ne fun h => ?_
  rw [← h, tsub_pos_iff_lt] at h₁
  exact h₂.not_ge (ha.add_le_iff_nonpos_left.1 <| add_le_of_le_tsub_left_of_le h₁.le h.ge)

protected theorem tsub_lt_self_iff (ha : AddLECancellable a) : a - b < a ↔ 0 < a ∧ 0 < b := by
  refine ⟨fun h => ⟨h.pos, pos_of_ne_zero ?_⟩, fun h => ha.tsub_lt_self h.1 h.2⟩
  rintro rfl
  rw [tsub_zero] at h
  exact h.false

/-- See `lt_tsub_iff_left_of_le_of_le` for a weaker statement in a partial order. -/
protected theorem tsub_lt_tsub_iff_left_of_le (ha : AddLECancellable a) (hb : AddLECancellable b)
    (h : b ≤ a) : a - b < a - c ↔ c < b :=
  lt_iff_lt_of_le_iff_le <| ha.tsub_le_tsub_iff_left hb h

end AddLECancellable

section Contra

variable [AddLeftReflectLE α]

/-- This lemma also holds for `ENNReal`, but we need a different proof for that. -/

name: tsub_tsub_eq_min
statement: theorem tsub_tsub_eq_min (a b : α) : a - (a - b) = min a b
proof:
rw [tsub_eq_tsub_min _ b, tsub_tsub_cancel_of_le (min_le_left a _)]

end Contra

/-! ### Lemmas about `max` and `min`. -/

name: tsub_add_eq_max
statement: theorem tsub_add_eq_max  : a - b + b = max a b
proof:
rcases le_total a b with h | h
  · rw [max_eq_right h, tsub_eq_zero_of_le h, zero_add]
  · rw [max_eq_left h, tsub_add_cancel_of_le h]

name: tsub_add_min
statement: theorem tsub_add_min  : a - b + min a b = a
proof:
rw [← tsub_min, @tsub_add_cancel_of_le]
  apply min_le_left

-- `Odd.tsub` requires `CanonicallyLinearOrderedSemiring`, which we don't have

name: sub_le
statement: theorem sub_le (a b c : R) : abv (a - c) ≤ abv (a - b) + abv (b - c)
proof:
simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc] using abv.add_le (a - b) (b - c)

@[simp high] -- added `high` to apply it before `AbsoluteValue.eq_zero`

name: map_neg
statement: theorem map_neg (a : R) : abv (-a) = abv a
proof:
by_cases ha : a = 0; · simp [ha]
  refine
    (mul_self_eq_mul_self_iff.mp (by rw [← abv.map_mul, neg_mul_neg, abv.map_mul])).resolve_right ?_
  exact ((neg_lt_zero.mpr (abv.pos ha)).trans (abv.pos (neg_ne_zero.mpr ha))).ne'

protected theorem map_sub (a b : R) : abv (a - b) = abv (b - a) := by rw [← neg_sub, abv.map_neg]

/-- Bound `abv (a + b)` from below -/
@[bound]
protected theorem le_add (a b : R) : abv a - abv b ≤ abv (a + b) := by
  simpa only [tsub_le_iff_right, add_neg_cancel_right, abv.map_neg] using abv.add_le (a + b) (-b)

/-- Bound `abv (a - b)` from above -/
@[bound]

name: sub_le_add
statement: theorem sub_le_add (a b : R) : abv (a - b) ≤ abv a + abv b
proof:
simpa only [← sub_eq_add_neg, AbsoluteValue.map_neg] using abv.add_le a (-b)

instance addGroupSeminormClass : AddGroupSeminormClass (AbsoluteValue R S) R S where
  toSubadditiveHomClass := AbsoluteValue.subadditiveHomClass
  map_zero := AbsoluteValue.map_zero
  map_neg_eq_map f a := AbsoluteValue.map_neg f a

instance [Nontrivial R] [IsDomain S] : MulRingNormClass (AbsoluteValue R S) R S :=
  { AbsoluteValue.subadditiveHomClass,
    AbsoluteValue.monoidWithZeroHomClass with
    map_neg_eq_map := fun f => f.map_neg
    eq_zero_of_map_eq_zero := fun f _ => f.eq_zero.1 }

open Int in

name: apply_natAbs_eq
statement: theorem apply_natAbs_eq (x : ℤ) : abv (natAbs x) = abv x
proof:
obtain ⟨_, rfl | rfl⟩ := Int.eq_nat_or_neg x <;> simp

open Int in
/-- Values of an absolute value coincide on the image of `ℕ` in `R`
if and only if they coincide on the image of `ℤ` in `R`. -/

name: not_isNontrivial_iff
statement: theorem not_isNontrivial_iff (v : AbsoluteValue R S) : ¬ v.IsNontrivial ↔ ∀ x ≠ 0, v x = 1
proof:
simp only [IsNontrivial]
  push Not
  rfl

omit [IsOrderedRing S] in
@[simp]

name: abv_sub_le
statement: theorem abv_sub_le (a b c : R) : abv (a - c) ≤ abv (a - b) + abv (b - c)
proof: simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc] using abv_add abv (a - b) (b - c)

name: mk_ratCast
statement: theorem mk_ratCast (q : ℚ) : mk (q : FiniteElement K) = q
proof:
change mk (FiniteElement.mk ..) = _
  cases q with | div n d hd
  rw [← mul_left_inj' (c := ↑d) (mod_cast hd), ← map_natCast mk d, ← map_mul,
    ← FiniteElement.mk_natCast, FiniteElement.mk_mul_mk]
  simp_all

/-- An embedding from an Archimedean field into `K` induces an embedding into
`FiniteResidueField K`. -/

name: ofArchimedean_injective
statement: theorem ofArchimedean_injective (f : R →+*o K) : Function.Injective (ofArchimedean f)
proof:
rw [injective_iff_map_eq_zero]
  intro r hr
  contrapose! hr
  rw [ofArchimedean_apply, mk_ne_zero]
  exact mk_map_of_archimedean' f hr

@[simp]

name: stdPart_monotoneOn
statement: theorem stdPart_monotoneOn  : MonotoneOn stdPart {x : K | 0 ≤ mk x}
proof:
intro x (hx : 0 ≤ mk x) y (hy : 0 ≤ mk y) h
  unfold stdPart
  rw [dif_pos hx, dif_pos hy]
  apply OrderRingHom.monotone'
  rwa [FiniteElement.mk_le_mk]

@[simp]

name: stdPart_zero
statement: theorem stdPart_zero  : stdPart (0 : K) = 0
proof:
rw [stdPart, dif_pos] <;> simp

@[simp]

name: stdPart_one
statement: theorem stdPart_one  : stdPart (1 : K) = 1
proof:
rw [stdPart, dif_pos] <;> simp

@[simp]

name: stdPart_neg
statement: theorem stdPart_neg (x : K) : stdPart (-x) = -stdPart x
proof:
simp_rw [stdPart, ArchimedeanClass.mk_neg]
  split_ifs
  · rw [← FiniteElement.neg_mk, map_neg]
  · simp

@[simp]

name: stdPart_inv
statement: theorem stdPart_inv (x : K) : stdPart x⁻¹ = (stdPart x)⁻¹
proof:
obtain hx | hx := eq_or_ne (mk x) 0
  · unfold stdPart
    have hx' : 0 ≤ mk x⁻¹ := by simp_all
    rw [dif_pos hx.ge, dif_pos hx']
    · apply eq_inv_of_mul_eq_one_left
      suffices FiniteElement.mk x⁻¹ hx' * .mk x hx.ge = 1 by
        rw [← map_mul, this, map_one]
      ext
      apply inv_mul_cancel₀
      aesop
  · rw [stdPart_of_mk_ne_zero hx, stdPart_of_mk_ne_zero, inv_zero]
    rwa [mk_inv, neg_ne_zero]

name: stdPart_add_eq_right
statement: theorem stdPart_add_eq_right (hx : 0 < mk x) : stdPart (x + y) = stdPart y
proof:
obtain hy | hy := le_or_gt 0 (mk y)
  · rw [stdPart_add hx.le hy, stdPart_of_mk_ne_zero hx.ne', zero_add]
  · rw [stdPart_of_mk_ne_zero hy.ne, stdPart_of_mk_ne_zero]
    rw [mk_add_eq_mk_right (hy.trans hx)]
    exact hy.ne

name: stdPart_add_eq_left
statement: theorem stdPart_add_eq_left (hy : 0 < mk y) : stdPart (x + y) = stdPart x
proof: rw [add_comm, stdPart_add_eq_right hy]

name: stdPart_sub_eq_right
statement: theorem stdPart_sub_eq_right (hx : 0 < mk x) : stdPart (x - y) = -stdPart y
proof: rw [sub_eq_add_neg, stdPart_add_eq_right hx, stdPart_neg]

name: stdPart_sub_eq_left
statement: theorem stdPart_sub_eq_left (hy : 0 < mk y) : stdPart (x - y) = stdPart x
proof: rw [sub_eq_add_neg, stdPart_add_eq_left (by simpa)]

name: stdPart_ratCast
statement: theorem stdPart_ratCast (q : ℚ) : stdPart (q : K) = q
proof:
rw [stdPart_of_mk_nonneg Classical.ofNonempty (mk_ratCast_nonneg q), FiniteElement.mk_ratCast,
    FiniteResidueField.mk_ratCast, map_ratCast]

@[simp]

name: mul_self_tsub_mul_self
statement: theorem mul_self_tsub_mul_self (a b : R) : a * a - b * b = (a + b) * (a - b)
proof:
rw [mul_tsub, add_mul, add_mul, tsub_add_eq_tsub_tsub, mul_comm b a, add_tsub_cancel_right]

/-- The `tsub` version of `sq_sub_sq`. Notably, this holds for `Nat` and `NNReal`. -/

name: sq_tsub_sq
statement: theorem sq_tsub_sq (a b : R) : a ^ 2 - b ^ 2 = (a + b) * (a - b)
proof: rw [sq, sq, mul_self_tsub_mul_self]

name: mul_self_tsub_one
statement: theorem mul_self_tsub_one (a : R) : a * a - 1 = (a + 1) * (a - 1)
proof:
rw [← mul_self_tsub_mul_self, mul_one]

end CommSemiring

end Sub

name: one_add_le_one_sub_mul_one_add
statement: theorem one_add_le_one_sub_mul_one_add (h : a + b + b * c ≤ c) : 1 + a ≤ (1 - b) * (1 + c)
proof:
rw [one_sub_mul, mul_one_add, le_sub_iff_add_le, add_assoc, ← add_assoc a]
  gcongr

name: one_add_le_one_add_mul_one_sub
statement: theorem one_add_le_one_add_mul_one_sub (h : a + c + b * c ≤ b) : 1 + a ≤ (1 + b) * (1 - c)
proof:
rw [mul_one_sub, one_add_mul, le_sub_iff_add_le, add_assoc, ← add_assoc a]
  gcongr

name: one_sub_le_one_sub_mul_one_add
statement: theorem one_sub_le_one_sub_mul_one_add (h : b + b * c ≤ a + c) : 1 - a ≤ (1 - b) * (1 + c)
proof:
rw [one_sub_mul, mul_one_add, sub_le_sub_iff, add_assoc, add_comm c]
  gcongr

name: one_sub_le_one_add_mul_one_sub
statement: theorem one_sub_le_one_add_mul_one_sub (h : c + b * c ≤ a + b) : 1 - a ≤ (1 + b) * (1 - c)
proof:
rw [mul_one_sub, one_add_mul, sub_le_sub_iff, add_assoc, add_comm b]
  gcongr

/-- A nontrivial ordered ring is of characteristic zero.
This is not made a global instance for performance reasons. -/

name: cast_mono
statement: theorem cast_mono  : Monotone (Int.cast : ℤ → R)
proof:
intro m n h
  rw [← sub_nonneg] at h
  lift n - m to ℕ using h with k hk
  rw [← sub_nonneg, ← cast_sub, ← hk, cast_natCast]
  exact k.cast_nonneg'

@[simp] lemma cast_nonneg : ∀ {n : ℤ}, 0 ≤ n → (0 : R) ≤ n | (n : ℕ), _ => by simp

variable [NeZero (1 : R)] {m n : ℤ}

@[simp] lemma cast_nonneg_iff : ∀ {n : ℤ}, (0 : R) ≤ n ↔ 0 ≤ n
  | (n : ℕ) => by simp
  | -[n+1] => by
    have : -(n : R) < 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt (by simp) zero_lt_one
    simpa [(negSucc_lt_zero n).not_ge, ← sub_eq_add_neg, le_neg] using this.not_ge

@[simp, norm_cast] lemma cast_le : (m : R) ≤ n ↔ m ≤ n := by
  rw [← sub_nonneg, ← cast_sub, cast_nonneg_iff, sub_nonneg]

name: cast_le_neg_one_of_neg
statement: theorem cast_le_neg_one_of_neg (h : a < 0) : (a : R) ≤ -1
proof:
rw [← Int.cast_one, ← Int.cast_neg, cast_le]
  exact Int.le_sub_one_of_lt h

variable (R) in

name: orderHom_zero
statement: theorem orderHom_zero (f : S →+o R) : orderHom f 0 = mk (f 1)
proof:
rw [← mk_one, orderHom_mk]

@[simp]

name: mk_intCast_nonneg
statement: theorem mk_intCast_nonneg (n : ℤ) : 0 ≤ mk (n : S)
proof:
obtain rfl | hn := eq_or_ne n 0
  · simp
  · rw [mk_intCast hn]

@[simp]

name: mk_div
statement: theorem mk_div (x y : R) : mk (x / y) = mk x - mk y
proof:
rw [div_eq_mul_inv, mk_mul, mk_inv, sub_eq_add_neg]

@[simp]

name: mk_ratCast_nonneg
statement: theorem mk_ratCast_nonneg (q : ℚ) : 0 ≤ mk (q : R)
proof:
obtain rfl | hn := eq_or_ne q 0
  · simp
  · rw [mk_ratCast hn]

name: isCompl_even_odd
statement: theorem isCompl_even_odd  : IsCompl { n : ℕ | Even n } { n | Odd n }
proof:
simp only [← Set.compl_setOf, isCompl_compl, ← not_even_iff_odd]

end Nat

name: geom_sum_pos_iff
statement: theorem geom_sum_pos_iff (hn : n ≠ 0) : 0 < ∑ i ∈ range n, x ^ i ↔ Odd n ∨ 0 < x + 1
proof:
refine ⟨fun h => ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [or_iff_not_imp_left, ← not_le, Nat.not_odd_iff_even]
    refine fun hn hx => h.not_ge ?_
    simpa [if_pos hn] using geom_sum_alternating_of_le_neg_one hx n
  · rintro (hn | hx')
    · exact hn.geom_sum_pos
    · exact geom_sum_pos' hx' hn

name: geom_sum_eq_zero_iff_neg_one
statement: theorem geom_sum_eq_zero_iff_neg_one (hn : n ≠ 0) : ∑ i ∈ range n, x ^ i = 0 ↔ x = -1 ∧ Even n
proof:
refine ⟨fun h => ?_, @fun ⟨h, hn⟩ => by simp only [h, hn, neg_one_geom_sum, if_true]⟩
  contrapose! h
  have hx := eq_or_ne x (-1)
  rcases hx with hx | hx
  · rw [hx, neg_one_geom_sum]
    simp only [h hx, ite_false, ne_eq, one_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true]
  · exact geom_sum_ne_zero hx hn

name: geom_sum_neg_iff
statement: theorem geom_sum_neg_iff (hn : n ≠ 0) : ∑ i ∈ range n, x ^ i < 0 ↔ Even n ∧ x + 1 < 0
proof:
rw [← not_iff_not, not_lt, le_iff_lt_or_eq, eq_comm,
    or_congr (geom_sum_pos_iff hn) (geom_sum_eq_zero_iff_neg_one hn), ← Nat.not_even_iff_odd, ←
    add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg, not_and, not_lt, le_iff_lt_or_eq, eq_comm, ← imp_iff_not_or, or_comm,
    and_comm, Decidable.and_or_imp, or_comm]

end LinearOrder
end Ring

/-! ### Geometric sum with `ℕ`-division -/

name: add_sq_le
statement: theorem add_sq_le  : (a + b) ^ 2 ≤ 2 * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2)
proof:
calc
    (a + b) ^ 2 = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + (a * b + b * a) := by
        simp_rw [pow_succ', pow_zero, mul_one, add_mul, mul_add, add_comm (b * a), add_add_add_comm]
    _ ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + (a * a + b * b) := add_le_add_right ?_ _
    _ = _ := by simp_rw [pow_succ', pow_zero, mul_one, two_mul]
  cases le_total a b
  · exact mul_add_mul_le_mul_add_mul ‹_› ‹_›
  · exact mul_add_mul_le_mul_add_mul' ‹_› ‹_›

-- TODO: Use `gcongr`, `positivity`, `ring` once those tactics are made available here

name: mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_left
statement: theorem mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_left (eq : a.1.1 = b.1.1) : a = b
proof:
refine Subtype.ext <| Prod.ext_iff.mpr ⟨eq, eq_of_mul_eq_add_eq_one a.1.1 ?_ a.2.2 ?_⟩
  · rw [a.2.1, mul_comm, eq, b.2.1]
  · rw [eq, b.2.2]

name: mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_right
statement: theorem mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_right (eq : a.1.2 = b.1.2) : a = b
proof:
refine Subtype.ext <| Prod.ext_iff.mpr ⟨eq_of_mul_eq_add_eq_one a.1.2 ?_ ?_ ?_, eq⟩
  · rw [mul_comm, a.2.1, eq, b.2.1]
  · rw [add_comm, a.2.2]
  · rw [add_comm, eq, b.2.2]

instance : PartialOrder {a : R × R // a.1 * a.2 = 0 ∧ a.1 + a.2 = 1} where
  le a b := a.1.1 * b.1.1 = a.1.1
  le_refl a := (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).1
  le_trans a b c hab hbc := show _ = _ by rw [← hab, mul_assoc, hbc]
  le_antisymm a b hab hba := mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_left <| by rw [← hab, mul_comm, hba]

instance : SemilatticeSup {a : R × R // a.1 * a.2 = 0 ∧ a.1 + a.2 = 1} where
  sup a b := ⟨(a.1.1 + a.1.2 * b.1.1, a.1.2 * b.1.2), by simp_rw [add_mul,
      mul_mul_mul_comm _ b.1.1, b.2.1, mul_zero, ← mul_assoc, a.2.1, zero_mul, add_zero], by
    simp_rw [add_assoc, ← mul_add, b.2.2, mul_one, a.2.2]⟩
  le_sup_left a b := by
    simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), mul_add, ← mul_assoc, a.2.1, zero_mul, add_zero,
      (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).1.eq]
  le_sup_right a b := by
    simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), mul_add, mul_comm a.1.2, ← mul_assoc,
      (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add b.2.1 b.2.2).1.eq, ← mul_add, a.2.2, mul_one]
  sup_le a b c hac hbc := by simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), add_mul, mul_assoc]; rw [hac, hbc]

instance : BooleanAlgebra {a : R × R // a.1 * a.2 = 0 ∧ a.1 + a.2 = 1} where
  inf a b := (aᶜ ⊔ bᶜ)ᶜ
  inf_le_left a b := by simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), (· ⊔ ·), (·ᶜ), SemilatticeSup.sup,
    mul_right_comm, (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).1.eq]
  inf_le_right a b := by simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), (· ⊔ ·), (·ᶜ), SemilatticeSup.sup,
    mul_assoc, (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add b.2.1 b.2.2).1.eq]
  le_inf a b c hab hac := by
    simp_rw [(· ≤ ·), (· ⊔ ·), (·ᶜ), SemilatticeSup.sup, ← mul_assoc]; rw [hab, hac]
  le_sup_inf a b c := Eq.le <| mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_right <| by
    simp_rw +instances [(· ⊔ ·), (· ⊓ ·), (·ᶜ), SemilatticeSup.sup, add_mul, mul_add,
      mul_mul_mul_comm _ b.1.1, (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).2.eq, ← mul_assoc, a.2.1,
      zero_mul, zero_add]
  top := ⟨(1, 0), mul_zero _, add_zero _⟩
  bot := ⟨(0, 1), zero_mul _, zero_add _⟩
  inf_compl_le_bot a := Eq.le <| mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_right <| by
    simp_rw +instances [(· ⊔ ·), (· ⊓ ·), (·ᶜ), SemilatticeSup.sup,
      (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).1.eq, add_comm, a.2.2]
  top_le_sup_compl a := Eq.le <| mul_eq_zero_add_eq_one_ext_left <| by simp_rw [(· ⊔ ·), (·ᶜ),
    SemilatticeSup.sup, (IsIdempotentElem.of_mul_add a.2.1 a.2.2).2.eq, a.2.2]
  le_top _ := mul_one _
  bot_le _ := zero_mul _
  sdiff_eq _ _ := rfl
  himp_eq _ _ := rfl

end CommSemiring

instance {S : Type*} [CommSemigroup S] : SemilatticeInf {a : S // IsIdempotentElem a} where
  le a b := a.1 * b = a
  le_refl a := a.2
  le_trans a b c hab hbc := show _ = _ by rw [← hab, mul_assoc, hbc]
  le_antisymm a b hab hba := Subtype.ext <| by rw [← hab, mul_comm, hba]
  inf a b := ⟨_, a.2.mul b.2⟩
  inf_le_left a b := show _ = _ by simp_rw [mul_right_comm]; rw [a.2]
  inf_le_right a b := show _ = _ by simp_rw [mul_assoc]; rw [b.2]
  le_inf a b c hab hac := by simp_rw [← mul_assoc]; rw [hab, hac]

instance {M : Type*} [CommMonoid M] : OrderTop {a : M // IsIdempotentElem a} where
  top := ⟨1, .one⟩
  le_top _ := mul_one _

instance {M₀ : Type*} [CommMonoidWithZero M₀] : OrderBot {a : M₀ // IsIdempotentElem a} where
  bot := ⟨0, .zero⟩
  bot_le _ := zero_mul _

section CommRing

variable [CommRing R]

instance : Lattice {a : R // IsIdempotentElem a} where
  __ : SemilatticeInf _ := inferInstance
  sup a b := ⟨_, a.2.add_sub_mul b.2⟩
  le_sup_left a b := show _ = _ by
    simp_rw [mul_sub, mul_add]; rw [← mul_assoc, a.2, add_sub_cancel_right]
  le_sup_right a b := show _ = _ by
    simp_rw [mul_sub, mul_add]; rw [← mul_assoc, mul_right_comm, b.2, add_sub_cancel_left]
  sup_le a b c hac hbc := show _ = _ by simp_rw [sub_mul, add_mul, mul_assoc]; rw [hbc, hac]

instance : BooleanAlgebra {a : R // IsIdempotentElem a} where
  __ : DistribLattice _ := .ofInfSupLe fun a b c ↦ Eq.le <| Subtype.ext <| by
    simp_rw [(· ⊔ ·), (· ⊓ ·), SemilatticeSup.sup, SemilatticeInf.inf, Lattice.inf,
      SemilatticeInf.inf, mul_sub, mul_add, mul_mul_mul_comm]
    rw [a.2]
  __ : OrderTop _ := inferInstance
  __ : OrderBot _ := inferInstance
  compl a := ⟨_, a.2.one_sub⟩
  inf_compl_le_bot a := (mul_zero _).trans ((mul_one_sub ..).trans <| by rw [a.2, sub_self]).symm
  top_le_sup_compl a := (one_mul _).trans <| by
    simp_rw [(· ⊔ ·), SemilatticeSup.sup, add_sub_cancel, mul_sub, mul_one]
    rw [a.2, sub_self, sub_zero]; rfl
  sdiff_eq _ _ := rfl
  himp a b := ⟨_, (a.2.mul b.2.one_sub).one_sub⟩
  himp_eq a b := Subtype.ext <| by simp_rw [(· ⊔ ·), SemilatticeSup.sup,
    add_comm b.1, add_sub_assoc, mul_sub, mul_one, sub_sub_cancel, sub_add, mul_comm]

/-- In a commutative ring, the idempotents are in 1-1 correspondence with pairs of elements
whose product is 0 and whose sum is 1. The correspondence is given by `a ↔ (a, 1 - a)`. -/

name: abs_mul
statement: theorem abs_mul (a b : α) : |a * b| = |a| * |b|
proof:
rw [abs_eq (mul_nonneg (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b))]
  rcases le_total a 0 with ha | ha <;> rcases le_total b 0 with hb | hb <;>
    simp only [abs_of_nonpos, abs_of_nonneg, true_or, or_true, neg_mul, mul_neg, neg_neg, *]

/-- `abs` as a `MonoidWithZeroHom`. -/

name: abs_eq_iff_mul_self_eq
statement: theorem abs_eq_iff_mul_self_eq  : |a| = |b| ↔ a * a = b * b
proof:
rw [← abs_mul_abs_self, ← abs_mul_abs_self b]
  exact (mul_self_inj (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b)).symm

name: abs_lt_iff_mul_self_lt
statement: theorem abs_lt_iff_mul_self_lt  : |a| < |b| ↔ a * a < b * b
proof:
rw [← abs_mul_abs_self, ← abs_mul_abs_self b]
  exact mul_self_lt_mul_self_iff (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b)

name: abs_le_iff_mul_self_le
statement: theorem abs_le_iff_mul_self_le  : |a| ≤ |b| ↔ a * a ≤ b * b
proof:
rw [← abs_mul_abs_self, ← abs_mul_abs_self b]
  exact mul_self_le_mul_self_iff (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b)

name: abs_le_one_iff_mul_self_le_one
statement: theorem abs_le_one_iff_mul_self_le_one  : |a| ≤ 1 ↔ a * a ≤ 1
proof: simpa only [abs_one, one_mul] using abs_le_iff_mul_self_le (a := a) (b := 1)

name: sq_lt_sq
statement: theorem sq_lt_sq  : a ^ 2 < b ^ 2 ↔ |a| < |b|
proof: simpa only [sq_abs] using sq_lt_sq₀ (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b)

name: sq_le_sq
statement: theorem sq_le_sq  : a ^ 2 ≤ b ^ 2 ↔ |a| ≤ |b|
proof: simpa only [sq_abs] using sq_le_sq₀ (abs_nonneg a) (abs_nonneg b)

name: sq_eq_sq_iff_abs_eq_abs
statement: theorem sq_eq_sq_iff_abs_eq_abs (a b : α) : a ^ 2 = b ^ 2 ↔ |a| = |b|
proof:
simp only [le_antisymm_iff, sq_le_sq]

@[simp] lemma sq_le_one_iff_abs_le_one (a : α) : a ^ 2 ≤ 1 ↔ |a| ≤ 1 := by
  simpa only [one_pow, abs_one] using sq_le_sq (a := a) (b := 1)

@[simp] lemma sq_lt_one_iff_abs_lt_one (a : α) : a ^ 2 < 1 ↔ |a| < 1 := by
  simpa only [one_pow, abs_one] using sq_lt_sq (a := a) (b := 1)

@[simp] lemma one_le_sq_iff_one_le_abs (a : α) : 1 ≤ a ^ 2 ↔ 1 ≤ |a| := by
  simpa only [one_pow, abs_one] using sq_le_sq (a := 1) (b := a)

@[simp] lemma one_lt_sq_iff_one_lt_abs (a : α) : 1 < a ^ 2 ↔ 1 < |a| := by
  simpa only [one_pow, abs_one] using sq_lt_sq (a := 1) (b := a)

end LinearStrictOrderedRing

section LinearOrderedCommRing

variable [CommRing α] [LinearOrder α] (a b : α) (n : ℕ)

name: abs_sub_sq
statement: theorem abs_sub_sq (a b : α) : |a - b| * |a - b| = a * a + b * b - (1 + 1) * a * b
proof:
rw [abs_mul_abs_self]
  simp only [mul_add, add_comm, add_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, mul_one, mul_neg,
    neg_add_rev, neg_neg, add_assoc]

name: abs_geomSum_le
statement: theorem abs_geomSum_le  : |geomSum a b n| ≤ (n + 1) * max |a| |b| ^ n
proof:
induction n with | zero => simp [geomSum] | succ n ih => ?_
  refine (abs_add_le ..).trans ?_
  rw [abs_mul, abs_pow, Nat.cast_succ, add_one_mul]
  refine add_le_add ?_ (pow_le_pow_left₀ (abs_nonneg _) le_sup_right _)
  rw [pow_succ, ← mul_assoc, mul_comm |a|]
  gcongr
  exacts [abs_nonneg _, (abs_nonneg _).trans ih, le_sup_left]

omit [LinearOrder α] in
private theorem pow_sub_pow_eq_sub_mul_geomSum :
    a ^ (n + 1) - b ^ (n + 1) = (a - b) * geomSum a b n := by
  induction n with | zero => simp [geomSum] | succ n ih => ?_
  rw [geomSum, mul_add, mul_comm a, ← mul_assoc, ← ih,
    sub_mul, sub_mul, ← pow_succ, ← pow_succ', mul_comm, sub_add_sub_cancel]

name: abs_pow_sub_pow_le
statement: theorem abs_pow_sub_pow_le  : |a ^ n - b ^ n| ≤ |a - b| * n * max |a| |b| ^ (n - 1)
proof:
obtain _ | n := n; · simp
  rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel, pow_sub_pow_eq_sub_mul_geomSum, abs_mul, mul_assoc, Nat.cast_succ]
  gcongr
  · exact abs_nonneg _
  · exact abs_geomSum_le ..

end LinearOrderedCommRing

section

variable [Ring α] [LinearOrder α]

@[simp]

name: abs_dvd
statement: theorem abs_dvd (a b : α) : |a| ∣ b ↔ a ∣ b
proof: rcases abs_choice a with h | h <;> simp only [h, neg_dvd]

name: dvd_abs
statement: theorem dvd_abs (a b : α) : a ∣ |b| ↔ a ∣ b
proof: rcases abs_choice b with h | h <;> simp only [h, dvd_neg]

name: pow_eq_pow_iff_cases
statement: theorem pow_eq_pow_iff_cases  : a ^ n = b ^ n ↔ n = 0 ∨ a = b ∨ a = -b ∧ Even n
proof: rcases eq_or_ne n 0 with rfl | hn <;> simp [pow_eq_pow_iff_of_ne_zero, *]

name: pow_eq_one_iff_of_ne_zero
statement: theorem pow_eq_one_iff_of_ne_zero (hn : n ≠ 0) : a ^ n = 1 ↔ a = 1 ∨ a = -1 ∧ Even n
proof: simp [← pow_eq_pow_iff_of_ne_zero hn]

name: pow_eq_one_iff_cases
statement: theorem pow_eq_one_iff_cases  : a ^ n = 1 ↔ n = 0 ∨ a = 1 ∨ a = -1 ∧ Even n
proof: simp [← pow_eq_pow_iff_cases]

name: pow_eq_neg_one_iff
statement: theorem pow_eq_neg_one_iff  : a ^ n = -1 ↔ a = -1 ∧ Odd n
proof:
simpa using pow_eq_neg_pow_iff (R := R) one_ne_zero

end LinearOrderedRing

variable {m n a : ℕ}

/-- If `a` is even, then `n` is odd iff `n % a` is odd. -/

name: isCompl_even_odd
statement: theorem isCompl_even_odd  : IsCompl { n : ℤ | Even n } { n | Odd n }
proof:
simp [← not_even_iff_odd, ← Set.compl_setOf, isCompl_compl]

@[simp]

name: mul_def
statement: theorem mul_def (a b : WithTop α) : a * b = if a = 0 ∨ b = 0 then 0 else WithTop.map₂ (· * ·) a b
proof: cases a <;> cases b <;> aesop

name: untopD_zero_mul
statement: theorem untopD_zero_mul (a b : WithTop α) : (a * b).untopD 0 = a.untopD 0 * b.untopD 0
proof:
by_cases ha : a = 0; · rw [ha, zero_mul, ← coe_zero, untopD_coe, zero_mul]
  by_cases hb : b = 0; · rw [hb, mul_zero, ← coe_zero, untopD_coe, mul_zero]
  cases a; · rw [top_mul hb, untopD_top, zero_mul]
  cases b; · rw [mul_top ha, untopD_top, mul_zero]
  rw [← coe_mul, untopD_coe, untopD_coe, untopD_coe]

name: pow_eq_top_iff
statement: theorem pow_eq_top_iff  : x ^ n = ⊤ ↔ x = ⊤ ∧ n ≠ 0
proof: cases x <;> cases n <;> simp [← coe_pow]

name: pow_lt_top_iff
statement: theorem pow_lt_top_iff  : x ^ n < ⊤ ↔ x < ⊤ ∨ n = 0
proof: simp_rw [WithTop.lt_top_iff_ne_top, pow_ne_top_iff]

name: mul_def
statement: theorem mul_def (a b : WithBot α) : a * b = if a = 0 ∨ b = 0 then 0 else WithBot.map₂ (· * ·) a b
proof: cases a <;> cases b <;> aesop

name: unbotD_zero_mul
statement: theorem unbotD_zero_mul (a b : WithBot α) : (a * b).unbotD 0 = a.unbotD 0 * b.unbotD 0
proof:
by_cases ha : a = 0; · rw [ha, zero_mul, ← coe_zero, unbotD_coe, zero_mul]
  by_cases hb : b = 0; · rw [hb, mul_zero, ← coe_zero, unbotD_coe, mul_zero]
  cases a; · rw [bot_mul hb, unbotD_bot, zero_mul]
  cases b; · rw [mul_bot ha, unbotD_bot, mul_zero]
  rw [← coe_mul, unbotD_coe, unbotD_coe, unbotD_coe]

name: toLinearMap_add
statement: theorem toLinearMap_add (f g : E₁ →ₚ[R] E₂) : (f + g).toLinearMap = f.toLinearMap + g.toLinearMap
proof:
rfl

@[simp]

name: iSupIndep_stratum
statement: theorem iSupIndep_stratum  : iSupIndep u.stratum
proof:
intro c
  rw [Submodule.disjoint_def']
  intro a ha b hb hab
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := (Submodule.mem_iSup_iff_exists_dfinsupp' _ b).mp hb
  obtain hf' := congr(ArchimedeanClass.mk $hf)
  contrapose! hf' with h0
  rw [← hab, DFinsupp.sum]
  by_cases! hnonempty : f.support.Nonempty
  · have hmem (x : FiniteArchimedeanClass M) : (f x).val ∈ u.stratum x :=
      Set.mem_of_mem_of_subset (f x).prop (by simp)
    have hmono : StrictMonoOn (fun i ↦ ArchimedeanClass.mk (f i).val) f.support := by
      intro x hx y hy hxy
      change ArchimedeanClass.mk (f x).val < ArchimedeanClass.mk (f y).val
      rw [u.archimedeanClassMk_of_mem_stratum (hmem x) (by simpa using hx)]
      rw [u.archimedeanClassMk_of_mem_stratum (hmem y) (by simpa using hy)]
      exact hxy
    rw [ArchimedeanClass.mk_sum hnonempty hmono, u.archimedeanClassMk_of_mem_stratum (hmem _)
      (by simpa using f.support.min'_mem hnonempty), ← val_mk h0, Subtype.coe_ne_coe]
    by_contra!
    obtain h := this ▸ Finset.min'_mem f.support hnonempty
    contrapose! h
    have := u.archimedeanClassMk_of_mem_stratum ha h0
    rw [← val_mk h0, ← Subtype.ext_iff] at this
    simpa [DFinsupp.notMem_support_iff, this] using (f c).prop
  · rw [hnonempty]
    symm
    simpa using h0

/-- The minimal submodule that contains all strata.

This is the domain of our "base" embedding into Hahn series, which we will extend into a full
embedding. -/

name: baseEmbedding_strictMono
statement: theorem baseEmbedding_strictMono  : StrictMono seed.baseEmbedding
proof:
intro x y h
  apply lt_of_sub_pos
  rw [← LinearPMap.map_sub]
  exact baseEmbedding_pos _ <| by simpa using h

set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in

name: exists_isMax
statement: theorem exists_isMax  : ∃ f : Partial seed, IsMax f
proof:
apply zorn_le_nonempty
  intro c hc hnonempty
  exact ⟨sSup hnonempty hc.directedOn, mem_upperBounds.mpr fun _ hf ↦ le_sSupFun hc.directedOn hf⟩

set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
variable (seed) in
/-- There exists a `HahnEmbedding.Partial` whose domain is the whole module. -/

name: smul_lt_smul_iff_of_neg_left
statement: theorem smul_lt_smul_iff_of_neg_left (ha : a < 0) : a • b₁ < a • b₂ ↔ b₂ < b₁
proof:
rw [← neg_neg a, neg_smul, neg_smul (-a), neg_lt_neg_iff]
  exact smul_lt_smul_iff_of_pos_left (neg_pos_of_neg ha)

name: smul_pos_iff_of_neg_left
statement: theorem smul_pos_iff_of_neg_left (ha : a < 0) : 0 < a • b ↔ b < 0
proof:
simpa only [smul_zero] using smul_lt_smul_iff_of_neg_left ha (b₁ := (0 : β))

alias ⟨_, smul_pos_of_neg_of_neg⟩ := smul_pos_iff_of_neg_left

name: smul_neg_iff_of_neg_left
statement: theorem smul_neg_iff_of_neg_left (ha : a < 0) : a • b < 0 ↔ 0 < b
proof:
simpa only [smul_zero] using smul_lt_smul_iff_of_neg_left ha (b₂ := (0 : β))

end PosSMulStrictMono
end OrderedAddCommGroup

section LinearOrderedAddCommGroup
variable [AddCommGroup β] [LinearOrder β] [IsOrderedAddMonoid β] [Module α β] [PosSMulMono α β]
  {a : α} {b b₁ b₂ : β}

name: nonneg_and_nonneg_or_nonpos_and_nonpos_of_smul_nonneg
statement: theorem nonneg_and_nonneg_or_nonpos_and_nonpos_of_smul_nonneg (hab : 0 ≤ a • b) : 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ b ∨ a ≤ 0 ∧ b ≤ 0
proof:
simp only [Decidable.or_iff_not_not_and_not, not_and, not_le]
  refine fun ab nab ↦ hab.not_gt ?_
  obtain ha | rfl | ha := lt_trichotomy 0 a
  exacts [smul_neg_of_pos_of_neg ha (ab ha.le), ((ab le_rfl).asymm (nab le_rfl)).elim,
    smul_neg_of_neg_of_pos ha (nab ha.le)]

name: smul_nonpos_iff
statement: theorem smul_nonpos_iff  : a • b ≤ 0 ↔ 0 ≤ a ∧ b ≤ 0 ∨ a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b
proof: rw [← neg_nonneg, ← smul_neg, smul_nonneg_iff, neg_nonneg, neg_nonpos]

name: smul_nonneg_iff_neg_imp_nonpos
statement: theorem smul_nonneg_iff_neg_imp_nonpos  : 0 ≤ a • b ↔ (a < 0 → b ≤ 0) ∧ (b < 0 → a ≤ 0)
proof: rw [← neg_smul_neg, smul_nonneg_iff_pos_imp_nonneg]; simp only [neg_pos, neg_nonneg]

name: smul_nonpos_iff_pos_imp_nonpos
statement: theorem smul_nonpos_iff_pos_imp_nonpos  : a • b ≤ 0 ↔ (0 < a → b ≤ 0) ∧ (b < 0 → 0 ≤ a)
proof: rw [← neg_nonneg, ← smul_neg, smul_nonneg_iff_pos_imp_nonneg]; simp only [neg_pos, neg_nonneg]

name: smul_nonpos_iff_neg_imp_nonneg
statement: theorem smul_nonpos_iff_neg_imp_nonneg  : a • b ≤ 0 ↔ (a < 0 → 0 ≤ b) ∧ (0 < b → a ≤ 0)
proof:
rw [← neg_nonneg, ← neg_smul, smul_nonneg_iff_pos_imp_nonneg]; simp only [neg_pos, neg_nonneg]

end LinearOrderedRing

namespace Prod
variable {γ : Type*} [Zero α]

section SMul
variable [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] [SMul α β] [SMul α γ]

instance instPosSMulMono [PosSMulMono α β] [PosSMulMono α γ] : PosSMulMono α (β × γ) where
  smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left _a ha _b₁ _b₂ hb :=
    ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left hb.1 ha, smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left hb.2 ha⟩

instance instPosSMulReflectLE [PosSMulReflectLE α β] [PosSMulReflectLE α γ] :
    PosSMulReflectLE α (β × γ) where
  le_of_smul_le_smul_left _a ha _b₁ _b₂ h :=
    ⟨le_of_smul_le_smul_left h.1 ha, le_of_smul_le_smul_left h.2 ha⟩

variable [Zero β] [Zero γ]

instance instSMulPosMono [SMulPosMono α β] [SMulPosMono α γ] : SMulPosMono α (β × γ) where
  smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right _b hb _a₁ _a₂ ha :=
    ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right ha hb.1, smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right ha hb.2⟩

instance instSMulPosReflectLE [SMulPosReflectLE α β] [SMulPosReflectLE α γ] :
    SMulPosReflectLE α (β × γ) where
  le_of_smul_le_smul_right _b hb _a₁ _a₂ h := by
    rcases lt_iff.mp hb with ⟨h₁, -⟩ | ⟨-, h₁⟩
    · exact le_of_smul_le_smul_right h.1 h₁
    · exact le_of_smul_le_smul_right h.2 h₁

end SMul

section SMulWithZero
variable [PartialOrder α] [PartialOrder β] [PartialOrder γ]
  [Zero β] [Zero γ] [SMulWithZero α β] [SMulWithZero α γ]

instance instPosSMulStrictMono [PosSMulStrictMono α β] [PosSMulStrictMono α γ] :
    PosSMulStrictMono α (β × γ) where
  smul_lt_smul_of_pos_left := by
    simp_rw [lt_iff]
    rintro _a ha _b₁ _b₂ (⟨h₁, h₂⟩ | ⟨h₁, h₂⟩)
    · exact .inl ⟨smul_lt_smul_of_pos_left h₁ ha, smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left h₂ ha.le⟩
    · exact .inr ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left h₁ ha.le, smul_lt_smul_of_pos_left h₂ ha⟩

instance instSMulPosStrictMono [SMulPosStrictMono α β] [SMulPosStrictMono α γ] :
    SMulPosStrictMono α (β × γ) where
  smul_lt_smul_of_pos_right := by
    simp_rw [lt_iff]
    rintro a (⟨h₁, h₂⟩ | ⟨h₁, h₂⟩) _b₁ _b₂ hb
    · exact .inl ⟨smul_lt_smul_of_pos_right hb h₁, smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right hb.le h₂⟩
    · exact .inr ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right hb.le h₁, smul_lt_smul_of_pos_right hb h₂⟩

instance instSMulPosReflectLT [SMulPosReflectLT α β] [SMulPosReflectLT α γ] :
    SMulPosReflectLT α (β × γ) where
  lt_of_smul_lt_smul_right := by
    simp_rw [lt_iff]
    rintro b hb _a₁ _a₂ (⟨h₁, h₂⟩ | ⟨h₁, h₂⟩)
    · exact lt_of_smul_lt_smul_right h₁ hb.1
    · exact lt_of_smul_lt_smul_right h₂ hb.2

end SMulWithZero
end Prod

namespace Pi
variable {ι : Type*} {β : ι → Type*} [Zero α]

section SMul
variable [Preorder α] [∀ i, Preorder (β i)] [∀ i, SMul α (β i)]

instance instPosSMulMono [∀ i, PosSMulMono α (β i)] : PosSMulMono α (∀ i, β i) where
  smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left _a ha _b₁ _b₂ hb i := smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left (hb i) ha

instance instPosSMulReflectLE [∀ i, PosSMulReflectLE α (β i)] : PosSMulReflectLE α (∀ i, β i) where
  le_of_smul_le_smul_left _a ha _b₁ _b₂ h i := le_of_smul_le_smul_left (h i) ha

variable [∀ i, Zero (β i)]

instance instSMulPosMono [∀ i, SMulPosMono α (β i)] : SMulPosMono α (∀ i, β i) where
  smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right _b hb _a₁ _a₂ ha i := smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right ha (hb i)

instance instSMulPosReflectLE [∀ i, SMulPosReflectLE α (β i)] : SMulPosReflectLE α (∀ i, β i) where
  le_of_smul_le_smul_right _b hb _a₁ _a₂ h := by
    obtain ⟨-, i, hi⟩ := lt_def.1 hb; exact le_of_smul_le_smul_right (h _) hi

end SMul


section SMulWithZero
variable [∀ i, Zero (β i)] [PartialOrder α] [∀ i, PartialOrder (β i)] [∀ i, SMulWithZero α (β i)]

instance instPosSMulStrictMono [∀ i, PosSMulStrictMono α (β i)] :
    PosSMulStrictMono α (∀ i, β i) where
  smul_lt_smul_of_pos_left := by
    simp_rw [lt_def]
    rintro _a ha _b₁ _b₂ ⟨hb, i, hi⟩
    exact ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_left hb ha.le, i, smul_lt_smul_of_pos_left hi ha⟩

instance instSMulPosStrictMono [∀ i, SMulPosStrictMono α (β i)] :
    SMulPosStrictMono α (∀ i, β i) where
  smul_lt_smul_of_pos_right := by
    simp_rw [lt_def]
    rintro a ⟨ha, i, hi⟩ _b₁ _b₂ hb
    exact ⟨smul_le_smul_of_nonneg_right hb.le ha, i, smul_lt_smul_of_pos_right hb hi⟩

-- Note: There is no interesting instance for `PosSMulReflectLT α (∀ i, β i)` that's not already
-- implied by the other instances

instance instSMulPosReflectLT [∀ i, SMulPosReflectLT α (β i)] : SMulPosReflectLT α (∀ i, β i) where
  lt_of_smul_lt_smul_right := by
    simp_rw [lt_def]
    rintro b hb _a₁ _a₂ ⟨-, i, hi⟩
    exact lt_of_smul_lt_smul_right hi <| hb _

end SMulWithZero
end Pi

section Lift
variable {γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
  [SMul α β] [SMul α γ] (f : β → γ)

section
variable [Zero α]

name: inv_smul_le_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem inv_smul_le_iff_of_neg (h : a < 0) : a⁻¹ • b₁ ≤ b₂ ↔ a • b₂ ≤ b₁
proof: rw [← smul_le_smul_iff_of_neg_left h, smul_inv_smul₀ h.ne]

name: smul_inv_le_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem smul_inv_le_iff_of_neg (h : a < 0) : b₁ ≤ a⁻¹ • b₂ ↔ b₂ ≤ a • b₁
proof:
rw [← smul_le_smul_iff_of_neg_left h, smul_inv_smul₀ h.ne]

variable (G)

/-- Left scalar multiplication as an order isomorphism. -/
@[simps!]

name: inv_smul_lt_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem inv_smul_lt_iff_of_neg (h : a < 0) : a⁻¹ • b₁ < b₂ ↔ a • b₂ < b₁
proof: rw [← smul_lt_smul_iff_of_neg_left h, smul_inv_smul₀ h.ne]

name: smul_inv_lt_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem smul_inv_lt_iff_of_neg (h : a < 0) : b₁ < a⁻¹ • b₂ ↔ b₂ < a • b₁

name: inf_eq_half_smul_add_sub_abs_sub
statement: theorem inf_eq_half_smul_add_sub_abs_sub (x y : M) : x ⊓ y = (⅟2 : R) • (x + y - |y - x|)
proof:
rw [← two_nsmul_inf_eq_add_sub_abs_sub x y, two_smul, ← two_smul R,
    smul_smul, invOf_mul_self, one_smul]

variable (R) in

name: sup_eq_half_smul_add_add_abs_sub
statement: theorem sup_eq_half_smul_add_add_abs_sub (x y : M) : x ⊔ y = (⅟2 : R) • (x + y + |y - x|)
proof:
rw [← two_nsmul_sup_eq_add_add_abs_sub x y, two_smul, ← two_smul R,
    smul_smul, invOf_mul_self, one_smul]

end Semiring

section Ring
variable [Ring R] [LinearOrder R] [IsOrderedRing R] [AddCommGroup M] [LinearOrder M]
  [IsOrderedAddMonoid M] [Module R M] [PosSMulMono R M]

@[simp]

name: half_le_self_iff
statement: theorem half_le_self_iff  : a / 2 ≤ a ↔ 0 ≤ a
proof:
rw [div_le_iff₀ (zero_lt_two' α), mul_two, le_add_iff_nonneg_left]

@[simp]

name: half_lt_self_iff
statement: theorem half_lt_self_iff  : a / 2 < a ↔ 0 < a
proof:
rw [div_lt_iff₀ (zero_lt_two' α), mul_two, lt_add_iff_pos_left]

alias ⟨_, half_le_self⟩ := half_le_self_iff

alias ⟨_, half_lt_self⟩ := half_lt_self_iff

alias div_two_lt_of_pos := half_lt_self

name: add_thirds
statement: theorem add_thirds (a : α) : a / 3 + a / 3 + a / 3 = a
proof:
rw [← add_div, ← add_div, ← two_mul, ← add_one_mul 2 a, two_add_one_eq_three,
    mul_div_cancel_left₀ a three_ne_zero]

/-!
### Miscellaneous lemmas
-/

@[simp] lemma div_pos_iff_of_pos_left (ha : 0 < a) : 0 < a / b ↔ 0 < b := by
  simp only [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_pos_iff_of_pos_left ha, inv_pos]

@[simp] lemma div_pos_iff_of_pos_right (hb : 0 < b) : 0 < a / b ↔ 0 < a := by
  simp only [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right (inv_pos.2 hb)]

name: le_div_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem le_div_iff_of_neg (hc : c < 0) : a ≤ b / c ↔ b ≤ a * c
proof: rw [← neg_neg c, mul_neg, div_neg, le_neg, div_le_iff₀ (neg_pos.2 hc), neg_mul]

name: lt_div_iff_of_neg
statement: theorem lt_div_iff_of_neg (hc : c < 0) : a < b / c ↔ b < a * c
proof: rw [← neg_neg c, mul_neg, div_neg, lt_neg, div_lt_iff₀ (neg_pos.2 hc), neg_mul]

name: sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_right
statement: theorem sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_right (ha : c < a) : AntitoneOn (fun x ↦ (x - c)⁻¹) (Set.Icc a b)
proof:
by_cases hab : a ≤ b
  · exact sub_inv_antitoneOn_Ioi.mono <| (Set.Icc_subset_Ioi_iff hab).mpr ha
  · simp [hab, Set.Subsingleton.antitoneOn]

name: sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_left
statement: theorem sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_left (ha : b < c) : AntitoneOn (fun x ↦ (x - c)⁻¹) (Set.Icc a b)
proof:
by_cases hab : a ≤ b
  · exact sub_inv_antitoneOn_Iio.mono <| (Set.Icc_subset_Iio_iff hab).mpr ha
  · simp [hab, Set.Subsingleton.antitoneOn]

name: inv_antitoneOn_Ioi
statement: theorem inv_antitoneOn_Ioi  : AntitoneOn (fun x : α ↦ x⁻¹) (Set.Ioi 0)
proof:
convert sub_inv_antitoneOn_Ioi (α := α)
  exact (sub_zero _).symm

name: inv_antitoneOn_Iio
statement: theorem inv_antitoneOn_Iio  : AntitoneOn (fun x : α ↦ x⁻¹) (Set.Iio 0)
proof:
convert sub_inv_antitoneOn_Iio (α := α)
  exact (sub_zero _).symm

name: inv_antitoneOn_Icc_right
statement: theorem inv_antitoneOn_Icc_right (ha : 0 < a) : AntitoneOn (fun x : α ↦ x⁻¹) (Set.Icc a b)
proof:
convert sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_right ha
  exact (sub_zero _).symm

name: inv_antitoneOn_Icc_left
statement: theorem inv_antitoneOn_Icc_left (hb : b < 0) : AntitoneOn (fun x : α ↦ x⁻¹) (Set.Icc a b)
proof:
convert sub_inv_antitoneOn_Icc_left hb
  exact (sub_zero _).symm

/-! ### Relating two divisions -/

name: div_le_div_right_of_neg
statement: theorem div_le_div_right_of_neg (hc : c < 0) : a / c ≤ b / c ↔ b ≤ a
proof: rw [div_le_iff_of_neg hc, div_mul_cancel₀ _ hc.ne]

name: div_lt_div_right_of_neg
statement: theorem div_lt_div_right_of_neg (hc : c < 0) : a / c < b / c ↔ b < a
proof:
rw [div_lt_iff_of_neg hc, div_mul_cancel₀ _ hc.ne]

/-! ### Relating one division and involving `1` -/

name: sub_self_div_two
statement: theorem sub_self_div_two (a : α) : a - a / 2 = a / 2
proof:
grind

omit [PosMulReflectLT α] in

name: div_two_sub_self
statement: theorem div_two_sub_self (a : α) : a / 2 - a = -(a / 2)
proof: grind

name: add_sub_div_two_lt
statement: theorem add_sub_div_two_lt (h : a < b) : a + (b - a) / 2 < b
proof:
rwa [← div_sub_div_same, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm (b / 2), ← add_assoc, ← sub_eq_add_neg, ←
    lt_sub_iff_add_lt, sub_self_div_two, sub_self_div_two,
    div_lt_div_iff_of_pos_right (zero_lt_two' α)]

/-- An inequality involving `2`. -/

name: sub_one_div_inv_le_two
statement: theorem sub_one_div_inv_le_two (a2 : 2 ≤ a) : (1 - 1 / a)⁻¹ ≤ 2
proof:
-- Take inverses on both sides to obtain `2⁻¹ ≤ 1 - 1 / a`
  refine (inv_anti₀ (inv_pos.2 <| zero_lt_two' α) ?_).trans_eq (inv_inv (2 : α))
  -- move `1 / a` to the left and `2⁻¹` to the right.
  rw [le_sub_iff_add_le, add_comm, ← le_sub_iff_add_le]
  -- take inverses on both sides and use the assumption `2 ≤ a`.
  convert (one_div a).le.trans (inv_anti₀ zero_lt_two a2) using 1
  -- show `1 - 1 / 2 = 1 / 2`.
  rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add, ← two_mul, mul_inv_cancel₀ two_ne_zero]

/-! ### Miscellaneous lemmas -/


omit [PosMulReflectLT α] in

name: div_pos_iff
statement: theorem div_pos_iff  : 0 < a / b ↔ 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∨ a < 0 ∧ b < 0
proof: simp only [division_def, mul_pos_iff, inv_pos, inv_lt_zero]

name: div_neg_iff
statement: theorem div_neg_iff  : a / b < 0 ↔ 0 < a ∧ b < 0 ∨ a < 0 ∧ 0 < b
proof: simp [division_def, mul_neg_iff]

name: div_nonneg_iff
statement: theorem div_nonneg_iff  : 0 ≤ a / b ↔ 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ b ∨ a ≤ 0 ∧ b ≤ 0
proof: simp [division_def, mul_nonneg_iff]

name: div_nonpos_iff
statement: theorem div_nonpos_iff  : a / b ≤ 0 ↔ 0 ≤ a ∧ b ≤ 0 ∨ a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b
proof: simp [division_def, mul_nonpos_iff]

name: one_lt_div_iff
statement: theorem one_lt_div_iff  : 1 < a / b ↔ 0 < b ∧ b < a ∨ b < 0 ∧ a < b
proof:
rcases lt_trichotomy b 0 with (hb | rfl | hb)
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, one_lt_div_of_neg]
  · simp [zero_le_one]
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, one_lt_div]

name: one_le_div_iff
statement: theorem one_le_div_iff  : 1 ≤ a / b ↔ 0 < b ∧ b ≤ a ∨ b < 0 ∧ a ≤ b
proof:
rcases lt_trichotomy b 0 with (hb | rfl | hb)
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, one_le_div_of_neg]
  · simp [zero_lt_one.not_ge]
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, one_le_div]

name: div_lt_one_iff
statement: theorem div_lt_one_iff  : a / b < 1 ↔ 0 < b ∧ a < b ∨ b = 0 ∨ b < 0 ∧ b < a
proof:
rcases lt_trichotomy b 0 with (hb | rfl | hb)
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, hb.ne, div_lt_one_of_neg]
  · simp [zero_lt_one]
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, div_lt_one, hb.ne.symm]

name: div_le_one_iff
statement: theorem div_le_one_iff  : a / b ≤ 1 ↔ 0 < b ∧ a ≤ b ∨ b = 0 ∨ b < 0 ∧ b ≤ a
proof:
rcases lt_trichotomy b 0 with (hb | rfl | hb)
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, hb.ne, div_le_one_of_neg]
  · simp [zero_le_one]
  · simp [hb, hb.not_gt, div_le_one, hb.ne.symm]

name: le_of_forall_sub_le
statement: theorem le_of_forall_sub_le (h : ∀ ε > 0, b - ε ≤ a) : b ≤ a
proof:
contrapose! h
  simpa only [@and_comm ((0 : α) < _), lt_sub_iff_add_lt, gt_iff_lt] using
    exists_add_lt_and_pos_of_lt h

private lemma exists_lt_mul_left_of_nonneg {a b c : α} (ha : 0 ≤ a) (hc : 0 ≤ c) (h : c < a * b) :
    ∃ a' ∈ Set.Ico 0 a, c < a' * b := by
  have hb : 0 < b := pos_of_mul_pos_right (hc.trans_lt h) ha
  obtain ⟨a', ha', a_a'⟩ := exists_between ((div_lt_iff₀ hb).2 h)
  exact ⟨a', ⟨(div_nonneg hc hb.le).trans ha'.le, a_a'⟩, (div_lt_iff₀ hb).1 ha'⟩

private lemma exists_lt_mul_right_of_nonneg {a b c : α} (ha : 0 ≤ a) (hc : 0 ≤ c) (h : c < a * b) :
    ∃ b' ∈ Set.Ico 0 b, c < a * b' := by
  have hb : 0 < b := pos_of_mul_pos_right (hc.trans_lt h) ha
  simp_rw [mul_comm a] at h ⊢
  exact exists_lt_mul_left_of_nonneg hb.le hc h

private lemma exists_mul_left_lt₀ {a b c : α} (hc : a * b < c) : ∃ a' > a, a' * b < c := by
  rcases le_or_gt b 0 with hb | hb
  · obtain ⟨a', ha'⟩ := exists_gt a
    exact ⟨a', ha', hc.trans_le' (antitone_mul_right hb ha'.le)⟩
  · obtain ⟨a', ha', hc'⟩ := exists_between ((lt_div_iff₀ hb).2 hc)
    exact ⟨a', ha', (lt_div_iff₀ hb).1 hc'⟩

private lemma exists_mul_right_lt₀ {a b c : α} (hc : a * b < c) : ∃ b' > b, a * b' < c := by
  simp_rw [mul_comm a] at hc ⊢; exact exists_mul_left_lt₀ hc

name: zpow_eq_zpow_iff_cases₀
statement: theorem zpow_eq_zpow_iff_cases₀  : a ^ n = b ^ n ↔ n = 0 ∨ a = b ∨ a = -b ∧ Even n
proof: rcases eq_or_ne n 0 with rfl | hn <;> simp [zpow_eq_zpow_iff_of_ne_zero₀, *]

name: zpow_eq_one_iff_of_ne_zero₀
statement: theorem zpow_eq_one_iff_of_ne_zero₀ (hn : n ≠ 0) : a ^ n = 1 ↔ a = 1 ∨ a = -1 ∧ Even n
proof: simp [← zpow_eq_zpow_iff_of_ne_zero₀ hn]

name: zpow_eq_one_iff_cases₀
statement: theorem zpow_eq_one_iff_cases₀  : a ^ n = 1 ↔ n = 0 ∨ a = 1 ∨ a = -1 ∧ Even n
proof: simp [← zpow_eq_zpow_iff_cases₀]

name: zpow_eq_neg_one_iff₀
statement: theorem zpow_eq_neg_one_iff₀  : a ^ n = -1 ↔ a = -1 ∧ Odd n
proof:
simpa using zpow_eq_neg_zpow_iff₀ (α := α) one_ne_zero

/-! ### Bernoulli's inequality -/

/-- Bernoulli's inequality reformulated to estimate `(n : α)`. -/

name: posMulMono_iff_mulPosMono
statement: theorem posMulMono_iff_mulPosMono  : PosMulMono α ↔ MulPosMono α
proof: simp [posMulMono_iff, mulPosMono_iff, mul_comm']

name: posMulStrictMono_iff_mulPosStrictMono
statement: theorem posMulStrictMono_iff_mulPosStrictMono  : PosMulStrictMono α ↔ MulPosStrictMono α
proof: simp [posMulStrictMono_iff, mulPosStrictMono_iff, mul_comm']

name: posMulReflectLE_iff_mulPosReflectLE
statement: theorem posMulReflectLE_iff_mulPosReflectLE  : PosMulReflectLE α ↔ MulPosReflectLE α
proof: simp [posMulReflectLE_iff, mulPosReflectLE_iff, mul_comm']

name: posMulReflectLT_iff_mulPosReflectLT
statement: theorem posMulReflectLT_iff_mulPosReflectLT  : PosMulReflectLT α ↔ MulPosReflectLT α
proof: simp [posMulReflectLT_iff, mulPosReflectLT_iff, mul_comm']

name: lt_of_mul_self_lt_mul_self₀
statement: theorem lt_of_mul_self_lt_mul_self₀ (hb : 0 ≤ b) : a * a < b * b → a < b
proof:
simp only [← sq]
  exact lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left₀ _ hb

name: mul_inv_left_le
statement: theorem mul_inv_left_le (hb : 0 ≤ b) : a * (a⁻¹ * b) ≤ b
proof:
obtain rfl | ha := eq_or_ne a 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `a ≠ 0`. See `mul_inv_cancel_left`. -/

name: le_mul_inv_left
statement: theorem le_mul_inv_left (hb : b ≤ 0) : b ≤ a * (a⁻¹ * b)
proof:
obtain rfl | ha := eq_or_ne a 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `a ≠ 0`. See `inv_mul_cancel_left`. -/

name: inv_mul_left_le
statement: theorem inv_mul_left_le (hb : 0 ≤ b) : a⁻¹ * (a * b) ≤ b
proof:
obtain rfl | ha := eq_or_ne a 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `a ≠ 0`. See `inv_mul_cancel_left`. -/

name: le_inv_mul_left
statement: theorem le_inv_mul_left (hb : b ≤ 0) : b ≤ a⁻¹ * (a * b)
proof:
obtain rfl | ha := eq_or_ne a 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `b ≠ 0`. See `mul_inv_cancel_right`. -/

name: mul_inv_right_le
statement: theorem mul_inv_right_le (ha : 0 ≤ a) : a * b * b⁻¹ ≤ a
proof:
obtain rfl | hb := eq_or_ne b 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `b ≠ 0`. See `mul_inv_cancel_right`. -/

name: le_mul_inv_right
statement: theorem le_mul_inv_right (ha : a ≤ 0) : a ≤ a * b * b⁻¹
proof:
obtain rfl | hb := eq_or_ne b 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `b ≠ 0`. See `inv_mul_cancel_right`. -/

name: inv_mul_right_le
statement: theorem inv_mul_right_le (ha : 0 ≤ a) : a * b⁻¹ * b ≤ a
proof:
obtain rfl | hb := eq_or_ne b 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `b ≠ 0`. See `inv_mul_cancel_right`. -/

name: le_inv_mul_right
statement: theorem le_inv_mul_right (ha : a ≤ 0) : a ≤ a * b⁻¹ * b
proof:
obtain rfl | hb := eq_or_ne b 0 <;> simp [*]

/-- Equality holds when `c ≠ 0`. See `mul_div_mul_right`. -/

name: mul_div_mul_right_le
statement: theorem mul_div_mul_right_le (h : 0 ≤ a / b) : a * c / (b * c) ≤ a / b
proof:
obtain rfl | hc := eq_or_ne c 0
  · simpa
  · rw [mul_div_mul_right _ _ hc]

/-- Equality holds when `c ≠ 0`. See `mul_div_mul_right`. -/

name: le_mul_div_mul_right
statement: theorem le_mul_div_mul_right (h : a / b ≤ 0) : a / b ≤ a * c / (b * c)
proof:
obtain rfl | hc := eq_or_ne c 0
  · simpa
  · rw [mul_div_mul_right _ _ hc]

end Preorder

section Preorder
variable [Preorder G₀] [ZeroLEOneClass G₀] {a b c : G₀}

/-- See `div_self` for the version with equality when `a ≠ 0`. -/

name: inv_pos
statement: theorem inv_pos  : 0 < a⁻¹ ↔ 0 < a
proof:
suffices ∀ a : G₀, 0 < a → 0 < a⁻¹ from ⟨fun h ↦ inv_inv a ▸ this _ h, this a⟩
  intro a ha
  apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left _ ha.le
  apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left _ ha.le
  simpa [ha.ne']

alias ⟨_, inv_pos_of_pos⟩ := inv_pos

@[simp] lemma inv_nonneg : 0 ≤ a⁻¹ ↔ 0 ≤ a := by simp only [le_iff_eq_or_lt, inv_pos, zero_eq_inv]

alias ⟨_, inv_nonneg_of_nonneg⟩ := inv_nonneg

name: le_inv_mul_iff₀
statement: theorem le_inv_mul_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a ≤ c⁻¹ * b ↔ c * a ≤ b
proof:
rw [← mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left hc, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `inv_mul_le_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: inv_mul_le_iff₀
statement: theorem inv_mul_le_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : c⁻¹ * b ≤ a ↔ b ≤ c * a
proof: rw [← mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left hc, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ hc.ne']

name: lt_inv_mul_iff₀
statement: theorem lt_inv_mul_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a < c⁻¹ * b ↔ c * a < b
proof:
rw [← mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_left hc, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `inv_mul_lt_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: inv_mul_lt_iff₀
statement: theorem inv_mul_lt_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : c⁻¹ * b < a ↔ b < c * a
proof:
rw [← mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_left hc, mul_inv_cancel_left₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `inv_lt_iff_one_lt_mul₀` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: zpow_right_mono₀
statement: theorem zpow_right_mono₀ (ha : 1 ≤ a) : Monotone fun n : ℤ ↦ a ^ n
proof:
refine monotone_int_of_le_succ fun n ↦ ?_
  rw [zpow_add_one₀ (zero_lt_one.trans_le ha).ne']
  exact le_mul_of_one_le_right (zpow_nonneg (zero_le_one.trans ha) _) ha

name: zpow_right_strictMono₀
statement: theorem zpow_right_strictMono₀ (ha : 1 < a) : StrictMono fun n : ℤ ↦ a ^ n
proof:
refine strictMono_int_of_lt_succ fun n ↦ ?_
  rw [zpow_add_one₀ (zero_lt_one.trans ha).ne']
  exact lt_mul_of_one_lt_right (zpow_pos (zero_lt_one.trans ha) _) ha

name: one_le_zpow_iff_right₀
statement: theorem one_le_zpow_iff_right₀ (ha : 1 < a) : 1 ≤ a ^ n ↔ 0 ≤ n
proof:
simp [← zpow_le_zpow_iff_right₀ ha]

@[simp] lemma one_lt_zpow_iff_right₀ (ha : 1 < a) : 1 < a ^ n ↔ 0 < n := by
  simp [← zpow_lt_zpow_iff_right₀ ha]

@[simp] lemma one_le_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ (ha₀ : 0 < a) (ha₁ : a < 1) : 1 ≤ a ^ n ↔ n ≤ 0 := by
  simp [← zpow_le_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ ha₀ ha₁]

@[simp] lemma one_lt_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ (ha₀ : 0 < a) (ha₁ : a < 1) : 1 < a ^ n ↔ n < 0 := by
  simp [← zpow_lt_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ ha₀ ha₁]

@[simp] lemma zpow_le_one_iff_right₀ (ha : 1 < a) : a ^ n ≤ 1 ↔ n ≤ 0 := by
  simp [← zpow_le_zpow_iff_right₀ ha]

@[simp] lemma zpow_lt_one_iff_right₀ (ha : 1 < a) : a ^ n < 1 ↔ n < 0 := by
  simp [← zpow_lt_zpow_iff_right₀ ha]

@[simp] lemma zpow_le_one_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ (ha₀ : 0 < a) (ha₁ : a < 1) : a ^ n ≤ 1 ↔ 0 ≤ n := by
  simp [← zpow_le_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ ha₀ ha₁]

@[simp] lemma zpow_lt_one_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ (ha₀ : 0 < a) (ha₁ : a < 1) : a ^ n < 1 ↔ 0 < n := by
  simp [← zpow_lt_zpow_iff_right_of_lt_one₀ ha₀ ha₁]

end ZPow

end ZeroLEOneClass

section MulPosMono

variable [MulPosMono G₀] {n : ℤ}

name: zpow_left_monoOn₀
statement: theorem zpow_left_monoOn₀ (hn : 0 ≤ n) : MonotoneOn (fun a : G₀ ↦ a ^ n) {a | 0 ≤ a}
proof: lift n to ℕ using hn; simpa using pow_left_monotoneOn

name: zpow_left_strictMonoOn₀
statement: theorem zpow_left_strictMonoOn₀ (hn : 0 < n) : StrictMonoOn (fun a : G₀ ↦ a ^ n) {a | 0 ≤ a}
proof: lift n to ℕ using hn.le; simpa using pow_left_strictMonoOn₀ (by lia)

name: inv_pos
statement: theorem inv_pos  : 0 < a⁻¹ ↔ 0 < a
proof:
suffices ∀ a : G₀, 0 < a → 0 < a⁻¹ from ⟨fun h ↦ inv_inv a ▸ this _ h, this a⟩
  intro a ha
  apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right _ ha.le
  apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right _ ha.le
  simpa [ha.ne']

variable (G₀) in
/-- For a group with zero, `MulPosReflectLT G₀` implies `MulPosStrictMono G₀`. -/

name: le_mul_inv_iff₀
statement: theorem le_mul_inv_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a ≤ b * c⁻¹ ↔ a * c ≤ b
proof:
rw [← mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_right hc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `mul_inv_le_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: mul_inv_le_iff₀
statement: theorem mul_inv_le_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : b * c⁻¹ ≤ a ↔ b ≤ a * c
proof:
rw [← mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_right hc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `lt_mul_inv_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: lt_mul_inv_iff₀
statement: theorem lt_mul_inv_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a < b * c⁻¹ ↔ a * c < b
proof:
rw [← mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_right hc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `mul_inv_lt_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: mul_inv_lt_iff₀
statement: theorem mul_inv_lt_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : b * c⁻¹ < a ↔ b < a * c
proof:
rw [← mul_lt_mul_iff_of_pos_right hc, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ hc.ne']

/-- See `le_div_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: le_div_iff₀
statement: theorem le_div_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a ≤ b / c ↔ a * c ≤ b
proof:
rw [div_eq_mul_inv, le_mul_inv_iff₀ hc]

/-- See `div_le_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: div_le_iff₀
statement: theorem div_le_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : b / c ≤ a ↔ b ≤ a * c
proof:
rw [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_inv_le_iff₀ hc]

/-- See `lt_div_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: lt_div_iff₀
statement: theorem lt_div_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : a < b / c ↔ a * c < b
proof:
rw [div_eq_mul_inv, lt_mul_inv_iff₀ hc]

/-- See `div_lt_iff₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: div_lt_iff₀
statement: theorem div_lt_iff₀ (hc : 0 < c) : b / c < a ↔ b < a * c
proof: rw [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_inv_lt_iff₀ hc]

name: div_le_div_iff_of_pos_right
statement: theorem div_le_div_iff_of_pos_right (hc : 0 < c) : a / c ≤ b / c ↔ a ≤ b
proof: rw [div_le_iff₀ hc, div_mul_cancel₀ _ hc.ne']

name: div_lt_div_iff_of_pos_right
statement: theorem div_lt_div_iff_of_pos_right (hc : 0 < c) : a / c < b / c ↔ a < b
proof:
rw [div_lt_iff₀ hc, div_mul_cancel₀ _ hc.ne']

/-- See `inv_le_iff_one_le_mul₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: inv_le_iff_one_le_mul₀
statement: theorem inv_le_iff_one_le_mul₀ (ha : 0 < a) : a⁻¹ ≤ b ↔ 1 ≤ b * a
proof:
rw [← mul_inv_le_iff₀ ha, one_mul]

/-- See `inv_lt_iff_one_lt_mul₀'` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: inv_lt_iff_one_lt_mul₀
statement: theorem inv_lt_iff_one_lt_mul₀ (ha : 0 < a) : a⁻¹ < b ↔ 1 < b * a
proof: rw [← mul_inv_lt_iff₀ ha, one_mul]

name: inv_nonpos
statement: theorem inv_nonpos  : a⁻¹ ≤ 0 ↔ a ≤ 0
proof:
have := PosMulMono.toPosMulReflectLT (α := G₀); simp only [← not_lt, inv_pos]

alias inv_lt_zero := inv_neg''

name: inv_lt_one_iff₀
statement: theorem inv_lt_one_iff₀  : a⁻¹ < 1 ↔ a ≤ 0 ∨ 1 < a
proof: simp_rw [← not_le, one_le_inv_iff₀, not_and_or, not_lt]

name: inv_le_one_iff₀
statement: theorem inv_le_one_iff₀  : a⁻¹ ≤ 1 ↔ a ≤ 0 ∨ 1 ≤ a
proof: simp only [← not_lt, one_lt_inv_iff₀, not_and_or]

name: mul_div_mul_left_le
statement: theorem mul_div_mul_left_le (h : 0 ≤ a / b) : c * a / (c * b) ≤ a / b
proof:
obtain rfl | hc := eq_or_ne c 0
  · simpa
  · rw [mul_div_mul_left _ _ hc]

/-- Equality holds when `c ≠ 0`. See `mul_div_mul_left`. -/

name: le_mul_div_mul_left
statement: theorem le_mul_div_mul_left (h : a / b ≤ 0) : a / b ≤ c * a / (c * b)
proof:
obtain rfl | hc := eq_or_ne c 0
  · simpa
  · rw [mul_div_mul_left _ _ hc]

end Preorder

variable [CommGroupWithZero G₀] [PartialOrder G₀] [PosMulReflectLT G₀] {a b c d : G₀}

attribute [local instance] PosMulReflectLT.toPosMulStrictMono PosMulMono.toMulPosMono
  PosMulStrictMono.toMulPosStrictMono PosMulReflectLT.toMulPosReflectLT

/-- See `le_inv_mul_iff₀` for a version with multiplication on the other side. -/

name: exists_one_lt_mul_of_lt
statement: theorem exists_one_lt_mul_of_lt (h : a < b) : ∃ (c : _) (_ : 1 < c), a * c = b
proof:
obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := le_iff_exists_mul.1 h.le
  refine ⟨c, one_lt_iff_ne_one.2 ?_, hc.symm⟩
  rintro rfl
  simp [hc] at h

@[to_additive]

name: lt_iff_exists_mul
statement: theorem lt_iff_exists_mul  : a < b ↔ ∃ c > 1, b = a * c
proof:
rw [lt_iff_le_and_ne, le_iff_exists_mul, ← exists_and_right]
  apply exists_congr
  intro c
  rw [and_comm, and_congr_left_iff, gt_iff_lt]
  rintro rfl
  constructor
  · rw [one_lt_iff_ne_one]
    apply mt
    rintro rfl
    rw [mul_one]
  · rw [← (self_le_mul_right a c).lt_iff_ne]
    apply lt_mul_of_one_lt_right'

end PartialOrder

end MulOneClass

section Semigroup
variable [Semigroup α]

section LE
variable [LE α] [CanonicallyOrderedMul α]

-- see Note [lower instance priority]
@[to_additive]
instance (priority := 10) CanonicallyOrderedMul.toMulLeftMono :
    MulLeftMono α where
  elim a b c hbc := by
    obtain ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩ := exists_mul_of_le hbc
    rw [le_iff_exists_mul]
    exact ⟨c, (mul_assoc _ _ _).symm⟩

end LE

end Semigroup

-- TODO: make it an instance
@[to_additive]

name: one_lt_mul_iff
statement: theorem one_lt_mul_iff  : 1 < a * b ↔ 1 < a ∨ 1 < b
proof:
simp only [one_lt_iff_ne_one, Ne, mul_eq_one, not_and_or]

end PartialOrder

section CanonicallyLinearOrderedMonoid

variable [Monoid α] [LinearOrder α] [CanonicallyOrderedMul α]

@[to_additive]

name: min_mul_distrib
statement: theorem min_mul_distrib (a b c : α) : min a (b * c) = min a (min a b * min a c)
proof:
rcases le_total a b with hb | hb
  · simp [hb, le_mul_right]
  · rcases le_total a c with hc | hc
    · simp [hc, le_mul_left]
    · simp [hb, hc]

@[to_additive]

name: inv_mul_le_iff
statement: theorem inv_mul_le_iff  : u⁻¹ * a ≤ b ↔ a ≤ u * b
proof: rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_left, mul_inv_cancel_left]

name: le_inv_mul_iff
statement: theorem le_inv_mul_iff  : a ≤ u⁻¹ * b ↔ u * a ≤ b
proof:
rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_left, mul_inv_cancel_left]

@[simp] theorem one_le_inv : (1 : M) ≤ u⁻¹ ↔ (u : M) ≤ 1 := by
  rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_left, mul_one, mul_inv]

@[simp] theorem inv_le_one : u⁻¹ ≤ (1 : M) ↔ (1 : M) ≤ u := by
  rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_left, mul_one, mul_inv]

name: one_le_inv_mul
statement: theorem one_le_inv_mul  : 1 ≤ u⁻¹ * a ↔ u ≤ a
proof: rw [u.le_inv_mul_iff, mul_one]

name: inv_mul_le_one
statement: theorem inv_mul_le_one  : u⁻¹ * a ≤ 1 ↔ a ≤ u
proof:
rw [u.inv_mul_le_iff, mul_one]

alias ⟨le_mul_of_inv_mul_le, inv_mul_le_of_le_mul⟩ := inv_mul_le_iff
alias ⟨mul_le_of_le_inv_mul, le_inv_mul_of_mul_le⟩ := le_inv_mul_iff
alias ⟨le_of_one_le_inv, one_le_inv_of_le⟩ := one_le_inv
alias ⟨le_of_inv_le_one, inv_le_one_of_le⟩ := inv_le_one
alias ⟨le_of_one_le_inv_mul, one_le_inv_mul_of_le⟩ := one_le_inv_mul
alias ⟨le_of_inv_mul_le_one, inv_mul_le_one_of_le⟩ := inv_mul_le_one

end MulLeftMono

section MulRightMono
variable [MulRightMono M] {a b : M} (u : Mˣ)

private theorem mul_le_mul_iff_right : a * u ≤ b * u ↔ a ≤ b :=
  ⟨(by simpa using mul_le_mul_left · ↑u⁻¹), (mul_le_mul_left · _)⟩

name: mul_inv_le_iff
statement: theorem mul_inv_le_iff  : a * u⁻¹ ≤ b ↔ a ≤ b * u
proof: rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_right, u.inv_mul_cancel_right]

name: le_mul_inv_iff
statement: theorem le_mul_inv_iff  : a ≤ b * u⁻¹ ↔ a * u ≤ b
proof: rw [← u.mul_le_mul_iff_right, inv_mul_cancel_right]

name: one_le_mul_inv
statement: theorem one_le_mul_inv  : 1 ≤ a * u⁻¹ ↔ u ≤ a
proof: rw [u.le_mul_inv_iff, one_mul]

name: mul_inv_le_one
statement: theorem mul_inv_le_one  : a * u⁻¹ ≤ 1 ↔ a ≤ u
proof:
rw [u.mul_inv_le_iff, one_mul]

alias ⟨le_mul_of_mul_inv_le, mul_inv_le_of_le_mul⟩ := mul_inv_le_iff
alias ⟨mul_le_of_le_mul_inv, le_mul_inv_of_mul_le⟩ := le_mul_inv_iff
alias ⟨le_of_one_le_mul_inv, one_le_mul_inv_of_le⟩ := one_le_mul_inv
alias ⟨le_of_mul_inv_le_one, mul_inv_le_one_of_le⟩ := mul_inv_le_one

end MulRightMono
